titleStmt.title: Tattva Brata as Transmitted in Balinese Manuscripts: Digital Critical Edition and Parallel Translation
Tattva Brata

licence.p: This work is licenced under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported Licence. To view a copy of the licence, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ or send a letter to Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.

objectDesc.p: Palm-leaf manuscript. 44 leaves in Balinese script. Containing 119 vratas.

colophon.quote: tәhәr aṅupavāsa, sadina sarātri, ikaṅ pupula mvaṅ sәkar sataman, tәhәr vinaveṅ paturvan pinajaṅ pajaṅan, mәne riṅ ḍavuh ro, tәkaniṅ ḍavuh, 7, aṅarәpakәna labahan sәga pitā, ivak iṭik ginoreṅ, saha sasahur, lontar druven, padanda gәḍe madhe sāri, riṅ griya sindhu timur.

objectDesc.p: Palm-leaf manuscript. 14 leaves in Balinese script. Containing 70 vratas.

colophon.quote: i śaka, 1722. vai, ka, vr̥, vāra marakih, praṭipāda riṅ śukla pakṣa, asuji māsa, rah, 2, tǝṅgǝk, 2. i rika divasanya, pūrṇa linikhita.

objectDesc.p: Palm-leaf manuscript. 51 leaves in Balinese script. Date: Thursday Kalivon, Vuku Marakih, first of a lunar fortnight in the bright half of the lunar month, third month or around September-October, unit 2, tens 2, 1722 Śaka or 1800 AD. Containing 339 vratas.

colophon.quote: iti panarima brata, ina lontar sakiṅ, griya śveta, lombok. sane nәdunin, i ñoman dәgәṅ, sakiṅ bañjar kuvum, ababi, abaṅ, karaṅasәm. puput sinurat. kāla dina, a, u, vāra variga, śaśih jyeṣṭa, i śāka, 1921.

objectDesc.p: Palm-leaf manuscript. 51 leaves in Balinese script. Tuesday Umanis, Vara Variga, eleventh month around Mei-June, 1921 Śaka or 1999 AD. Containing 132 vratas.

colophon.quote: iki saṅ hyaṅ vidyotkranti yeniṅ vuvusәn. druven pakultas śāstra udayana.

objectDesc.p: Palm-leaf manuscript. 26 leaves in Balinese script. Containing 109 vratas.

projectDesc.p: Encoded in TEI according to the Conventions of Project DHARMA

div.ab:
Om̐
avighnam astu.

div.head: The Right Behavior in Performing the Observances
div.ab: nihan parikramaniṅpanarimatiṅkahiṅ panarima brata, yan kita mabrata, malәkasa brata hayva pati pati, yan duruṅvuruṅ amvit amita iṅiri saṅ asәḍahan brata, hyaṅriṅ hyaṅ kaki citragopta, nini citragopta, tarimanənri tarimanәn iṅ sumur, caruca, sәḍah putih hijo, ma, pukulun kaki citragopta, nini citragopta, iṅsun amvit abrata, pukulunbrata pukulun dulurәn iṅsun abrata, katәkana sapinakṣanpinakṣansapinokṣәn iṅsun, yan asalahaṣanpah abratabrata, asalahata asalaha riṅ saṅsaṅ hyaṅ asәḍahan brata, sabratanta maṅkana. mvah sisigiṅsisiṅ abrata, kaṅ rahayu tәmən, ambulu, pha, sugih mās, sisigsig kayən,hayәn pha, bahu putra, sisig vaṅkal, pha, sugih pari, sisig lampәni, pha, labdhavaravasiteṅ kita. samavor samavor samanteṅ kvehnya, yogyayoga yoya kayatnākәnakayatna tәmən.

div.head: Holy Scripture on the Observances
div.ab:
nihan saṅ hyaṅ tattva brata, kayatnākәna de saṅ amet kasiddhan, kasiddhaniṅ brata, tan pāvak tattvanira, saṅ hyaṅ dharma, rajəg turus, tattvanikatattvanira, apan pinakāvak balәbəd, lavanlavan ta tattvaniṅtattva brata, mvaṅ aṅlәpasakənmaṅlәpasakәnmaṅlәpasa kasiddhyan,kasiddhan sira kadyaṅganiṅ avak kiva tәṅən, maṅkana saṅ hyaṅ tattva brata mvaṅ tapa, mataṅnyanmataṅyanmataṅya lәkasakәnalәpasakәna de nirade saṅ amet hayu, anom alәkasalәkasa anom amaṅggihkapaṅgihmamaṅgih phalaniṅ brata, nora dadi yan tantan ginave, nora ṅalap titahiṅtitahniṅtitāniṅtitahiṅ ṅalap titahiṅ atitah,atah kady aṅggāniṅ haḍaṅaṅәḍaṅ esuk,aṅesuk esuk amaṅan, havan haḍaṅaṅәḍaṅ, havan amaṅan, yan iṅyan soresory haḍaṅ, soresory maṅan,
yan tannora paḍaṅ tan pamaṅan, saolahsapolah saolihsapolih, maṅkana kramanya, apan hala hayuniṅhayu pagave katәmu, mataṅnyan larisakәna pagave hayu, mijil sakeṅsaṅke tattva tapa brata.brata, ṅa

div.head: Detail Type on the Observances
div.ab: nihan pariñciniṅ brata, kavruhakәna.

hana brata mәgat rasa, ṅa, yankramanya, yan satәṅahvus amaṅan, suməṅkāṅinaṅpumәṅka āṅinaṅ, apәnəd tan paṅucappahupa, vus aṅinaṅ, malih amaṅan, satahun samayanya, bhaṭārī umā hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ umāyaiumāyeumāya namaḥ, pamit, pha, tan pәgat sihniṅ malaky arabi,amarami mvaṅ samantasarvakita katvaṅaniṅ janmasamaṅkana paḍa sih.sihnya

hana brata amaṅanmaṅanmaṅana sәga slaṅgiṅgiṅgihgaṅgi, ṅa, satahun pituṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭārī vastu hyaṅnya, ma, om̐ vastu devyaidevyedevaya namaḥ, pamit, pha, tan pәgatpәgatan sihniṅ malaky arabiamarabi, ṅunivehkunaṅ veh sihniṅnikaṅniṅ samanta janmasama janmajanma kabeh paḍāsih avәlaspadha vәlas asisihpadhāvlas ikabeh iriiti
kita.

hana brata yan amaṅan anūtakǝn vulan ... śiṣya təka; in P the title of the brata, mantra, and result is same with other witnesses, but tend to different in the technique to perform the observance. This is the complete passage of the ms P. "hana bratā hañutakәn hulan·, yan hamaṅan taṅgal hapisan·, sakәpәl·, taṅ, 2, rvaṅ kәpәl·, muṅgah sakәpәl· sadinā, tәkāniṅ taṅgal·, piṅ, 14, pūṛnama hamr̥ti, yan paṅloṅ hapisan·, piṅ, 14, sinuddhana sakәpәl·, tәkaniṅ til̥m hamr̥ti, tigaṅ lek· ṣamayanya, bhaṭārendra hyaṅnya, ma, Ōm̐ surendra ya namaḥ, pamit·. phalanya mantukiṅ bhaṭāra śivā, sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṅ ratu, mvaṅ riṅ vikva bhavu siṣyā kitā."

div.ab:
hana brata adyus
anuṅku rāt anuṅku ra añuṅku rāt ,
ṅa
,

div.p:
yaniṅ yan riṅ yen iṅ
śravaṇa masa,
adyus adyusa ḍavuh,
7 pitu ,
pisan
riṅ sore, pha, hulun masih
iri ri kita.
yaniṅyan riṅ bhādravada, adyusadyus ḍavuh, 4pat , phalanya, kasubhagankaṅ subhagan anuṅkunuṅku rāt.
yaniṅ asuji, adyusadyusa ḍavuh, 5lima, pha, sarvasalaka tәka.
yaniṅriṅ karttikā, adyusadyusa ḍavuh, 8volu, riṅ rātri, pha, bahu putrabahu putra mvaṅ mās pirak kapaṅgih, maṅkana kramanya.
yan riṅyan riṅ margghā sira, adyusadyusamadyus ḍavuh, 4pat, riṅ rātri, pha, prabhusaṅ prabhu masih.
yaniṅ poṣya māsa, adyusmadyusadyusa ḍavuh, 6nәm, sore, pha, vīryavan.
yaniṅ māgha māsamagha, adyusadyusamadyus ḍavuh, 8volu, vaṅun rahina jugavaha rahina guṇa, pha, sugih pari.
yaniṅ phalguṇa māṣa, adyusmadyusadyusamadyusa ḍavuh, 2ro, rahina, pha, bhoga gə̄ṅ katәmubhoga gәṅ tәmudeva masih, saṛvva siddha kārayantabhoga katәmu.
yaniṅyan cetra māsacetra, adyusmadyusadyusamadyusa, mādyusa ḍavuh, 3tiga, rahina, pha, deva masih sarva kāryanta siddhamvaṅ svakāryanta kasidda
yaniṅ veśakha māsa, adyusmadyusamadyus ḍavuh, 4pat, pha, laraniṅ hati hilaṅhilaṅ denya.
yaniṅ jyeṣṭā, adyusadyusamadyusa ḍavuh, 4pat, pha, siṅyaniṅ asiṅ kāryanta katəkan.
yaniṅ aṣādha masa, adyusmadyusa ḍavuh, 7pitu, pha, añjrahakǝn mās pirak, maṅkāna kramanya.

div.ab:
Iti śarīrasara śuddha, bhūmi soccabhūmi sudha, ṅa.
hana brata adyus ... bhūmi socca, ṅa
in 3.57 in 3.68 in 3.68 in 3.55 in 3.66
hana brata ṅulanteaniti vulanṅulanteṅ , ṅa,
div.p: amilaṅ kramanya vulan, kasa, tan pamaṅankavasa amaṅan sarva buṅkah, pha, dadi sarvakaṅ sarva tinandur.

vulanka, 2karo, tan pamaṅantan kavasa amaṅan sapi, phapolihnya , sugih sapi,
tan kagǝriṅǝnluput riṅ gәriṅ sasab tan gegәriṅan.
vulan, 3,katiga vulan, ka, 3 tan pamaṅan,tak kavasa pha, sugih vvit, tan gǝriṅ aguṅ, halaṅ halaṅmvaṅ alala.
vulan, 4,ka, 4kapat vulan, ka, 4 tan pamaṅantan kavasa tan amaṅan sarva roṇḍonroṇḍon, phapolihnya , dadi sarva rumambatdadi siṅ tinandur dadi kaṅ sarva rumambat, sarva gumantuṅ mvaṅ phala gumantung.

vulan, 5vulan, ka, 5, tan patukar, tan panǝmbuṅpәmbaṅ rare cili, pha, keḍәp mavәkaavәkasaavәka paṅucapta.G: ka, 5, yen aluluṅa tan paṅinәp, polihnya, sugih dr̥vya riṅ padhaṅan, mvaṅ rare hulun; kalima, tan kavasa haṅinәp riṅ paluṅayan

vulan, 6,ka, 6 tan paluluṅhāaluluṅha, tulak vali, yanyen luṅhāuluṅha, pha, sugih kavula,vrәddhi kabeh tur akehyakehakeh.
G: ka, 6, tan pamәṅiṅ rare, polihnya, dr̥man ahanak;

vulan, 7,ka, 7 tan pamaṅan sәga, pha, sugih parisugih riṅ, tan kakuraṅan tajak.
G: ka, 7, aṅraka, polihnya, apәkik tūr sugih pari

vulan, 8ka, 8kavolu vulan, ka, 8, tan pamaṅanaja maṅan tan kavasaaja amaṅan suku paatva, phapolihnya , sugih drәvesugih vәnaṅ-vәnaṅ
sarva vr̥ddhi sarva tәdasarvә vḍa .
vulan, 9,ka, 8,kasaṅa vulan, ka, 9 tan pamaṅan asuaja maṅan añjiṅ tan kavasa amaṅan asuaja amaṅan añjiṅ, phapolihnya , apәkik tan pahesabәcikiṅ mahakon, ayu pәkik, luputiṅ tuju tәluh.
vulan, 10,ka, 10kadaśa vulan, ka, 10, tan tumәṅeṅ tavaṅ, tan tumәṅeṅ laṅittan kavasa nәṅeṅ akaśa phapolihnya , prajñan kita. ha..pahakon, tәhәr dargayuśa, tan hana vani

vulan, jyeṣṭa, tan pamaṅan garәmtan pamaṅana, pha, sugih bhūmi, tan ilaṅ takonakәna, tur keḍәp kapintuhu.G and P are different from M N U. Here is the G: jyeṣṭā, aṅlavar·, polihnya, kedhapa savinuvus, labḍa va; P: jyeṣṭa, aja haturiṅ istri, yan istri aja aturu riṅ kakuṅ

vulan, saddhā, tan paturū lavan strī, strī tan paturu lavan lanaṅ, pha, drәman alaki, kinasihaniṅ lanaṅ, lanaṅ kinasihaniṅ vadon, tur keḍәp sapaṅucapta
G and P are quite different here. Here the G: da, tan paturu lavan stri, polihnya, dr̥man omahhe; P hasadhā, hayvaha tumuṅkuliṅ pr̥thivi. phalanya siṅ tinanduṛ dadi mvaṅ siṅ hiṅiṅon dadi luputiṅ griṅ haguṅ, kedhәpiṅ hanakānak, halaki rabi kinatoṅa:n, tan hamaṅgih maru, sugih dlahā, tan kelaṅan tan pavicara tuṛ kinasihan padhanta janmā mvaṅ kinasihan tuvan mvaṅ kavivicakṣaṇa, kinasihan deniṅ paṇdhita, vraddhi putrā, bavu vaṛggā diṛgha yuṣa.
hana bratta ṅulante ... keḍǝp sapaṅucapta
in 3.58 in 3.69 in 3.69 in 3.149 in 3.115
nihan aji tutug kavruhakәna,
pūrṇamaniṅ kasa, saṅ hyaṅ amūrva bhuvana, pinakabapa, asihasi ririṅ pinakeṅ huluṅ
pūrṇamaniṅ karo, saṅ hyaṅ madhu sudhana, pinakababu, asih ririṅ pinakeṅ hulun asih ri pinakeṅ hulun, listuhayu paripūrṇa dr̥̥man keḍәp puruṣa viśeṣa prajñan vicakṣaṇa, sukha sugih.
pūrṇamaniṅ katiga, saṅ hyaṅ madhu kusuma, pinakāvakiṅpinakiṅ hulun hulun lituhayulistvayulistvā paripūrṇa, drәman keḍәp puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñanpragan vicakṣaṇa, sukha sugih.
pūrṇamaniṅ kapat, saṅ hyaṅ asmara pinakalakiniṅ hulun, apәkikapәkik śakti prajurit vicakṣaṇa, puruṣā viśeṣa, prajñan sukha sugih jayeṅ śatru, asih pinakeṅ hulun.
pūrṇamaniṅ kalima, saṅ hyaṅ manobhava, pinakaanakiṅ hulun, panǝṅgǝk lanaṅ, apәkik prajurit, asih pinakeṅasih pinakeṅ hulun.
purṇnamāniṅ kanǝm, saṅ hyaṅsaṅ atanuantanu, pinakasanakiṅ hulun lanaṅ, paṅgulu, sukha sugih, asihasih riṅasih ri pinakeṅ hulun.
purṇamaniṅ kapitu, saṅ hyaṅ kāma jaya, pinakasanakiṅ hulun lanaṅ panәṅah, asihasih ri pinakeṅ hulun.
pūrṇamaniṅ kavolu, saṅ hyaṅ kāma ratih pinakasanakiṅ hulun lanaṅ vuruju, sukha sugih hasih ririṅ pinakeṅ hulun.
pūrṇamaniṅ kasaṅa, saṅ hyaṅ kumara, pinakakṣanapinakakṣanapinakasanak, dukiṅ hulun apaṅantenapapaṅanten pinasәlaṅinasәlaṅ.
pūrṇamaniṅ kasapuluh, saṅ hyaṅ amadhapa, samana dukiṅ hulun ābobot.
pūrṇamaniṅ jyeṣṭā, saṅ hyaṅ kumara, pinakaanakpinakasanak lanaṅ pambayun, hapkik prajurit, hasihiṅasih riasih riṅ pinakeṅ hulun, puruṣā viśeṣā, prajñan vicakṣaṇā, jayeṅ śatru, ahiḍǝp pinakeṅ hulun.
pūrṇamaniṅ aṣādha, saṅ hyaṅ komari, pinakaanak vadon paṅgulupaṅgugulu, lituhayulistvayulistuhayu paripūrṇa, drәman keḍәp, puruṣa viśeṣā, prajñan vicakṣaṇā, ahiḍәp pinakeṅ hulun.

phalaniṅ hulunphalaniṅ aṅaji tutug, aṅavruhākǝn anutuga bapa, ababu, tutuga malaky arabi, mahanak anakanak-anak tutug asanak, tutug akaki anini, tutug aputu habuyut, tumus riṅ tǝmbe, abagus kalavan ayu, paripūrṇa, drәman keḍәpsahiḍәp, sukha sugih, śrī sadana, mās maṇik, dodot lәmǝslәlәmәsulәmәs, akvehkveh dasihdaśahdasi, vәnaṅ vәnaṅ asuku pat, hasuku ro, sugih tanyakәna hirensugihanya kәna hirensugih tan kәna hiren, siddha saprayojaṇasaprayojñana, siddha salampah salaku, lǝvih kapaṅgih riṅ tǝmbe pañjanmanlә̥vih kapaṅgih maṅke, lәvih kapaṅgih maṅkekaṅ maṅko, tәmbe pañjanman, bhagavan pañarikan hanulisākǝn, saṅ hyaṅ triyodaśa sākṣi anakṣeniinakṣeni, bhaṭāra hyaṅ kabayan hañjǝnǝṅi.
nihan hajī tutug ... kabayan hañjǝnǝṅi
in 3.114 in 3.70 in 3.70 in 3.142 in 3.62

div.ab: nihan kramaniṅ abrata riṅ śaśih, ka, 4, riṅ pratipāda śukla, caru śuci riṅ saṅgar, saḍaṇḍanan sovaṅ, riṅ sor pupulāsәkar sataman, әnahakәna riṅ arәpiṅ saṅ amūjā, vusniṅ abhaktiaṅabhakti, tinīrthan, tәhәr aṅupāvasa, sadina sarātri, ikaṅ pupula mvaṅ sәkar sataman, tәhәr vinaveṅ paturvan pinajaṅ pajaṅan, mәne riṅ ḍavuh, 2ro, təkaniṅ ḍavuh, 7, aṅarәpakәna labahan sәga pita, ivak itik ginoreṅ saha sasahur, yan tan hananiṅ itik, hantiga kunaṅ, garәm, antajinya, caturdaśa dina, tan dadi anapak rigǝd, asidampati, ṅa.

mәne ri pūrṇamaniṅ kapat, yan ahyun amūjā smara, hinyasan tikaṅ yaśa riṅ pamarantyan pinajaṅ pajaṅān, uṅgvaniṅ abrata, yan vala pitambhara, yan vr̥ddha śvetāmbhara, amarәm pva saha paragi, ry uvusniṅ aśuci adyus, riṅ saṅgar, ca, rvaṅ daṅdhanan den jaṅkǝp saha catur, limas aguṅ, iseni sәga kuniṅ, ivak itik ginoreṅ, vinaṅgun hurip, gegembon, ṅa, hantiga pinәlut, kampuhi cicirupan, tancǝbi sәkar tәlǝṅ, tumpaṅana riṅ limas aguṅ, tetebhogan iseni sәga kuniṅ, masasahur, mevak itik ginoreṅ, vinaṅun hurip, lalamaka daluvaṅ, tulisi svara vyañjana, riṅ ibu dәṅǝn, caru madandanan sovaṅ den jaṅkǝp, caru riṅ sumur, tumpәṅ, 1, lalampadan, sasamuhan taḍah pavitra, caru riṅ sor kadi isiniṅ pasilih, tan kari pupula, sәkar sataman, tәlasniṅ caru tәrapakәna sirәmiṅ asәkar, lumәkas dhaṅ gurv amūjā sūrya śevana, kadi ṅrahina, taṅ abhakti sūrya, candra, saṅgar, ibu, dәṅǝn, kabasəṅ sumur, tiṅkahiṅ aṅabhakti, dukiṅ sore, tәṅah vәṅi, meh rahina, vusniṅ aṅabakti, kinonta dyus aśucya taṅ abrata, tәhәr iṅaskāran sinaṇḍiṅan pәras, tinīrthan jinaya jaya, tәlas.

alabuhana brata, padamәl, sәga livәt, tiṅkahiṅ aṅlivәt, ḍaṅḍaṅ tulisana padma, vusniṅ anajeni, syokniṅ antiga tambar, tutupi, yan vus matәṅ әnahana muṅgviṅ tapi, jinaya jaya, muvah jaṅan raratusan,
sabhāgyansabhageyan molih, 108, vārṇa, paruko tulis padma, ikaṅ nasi linivǝt tinumpaṅan gaṅan, muvah tumpǝṅ, isenana jǝbug arum, kaṅ vutuh, sadǝk, duk aṅaroni tinitisan madhu, pәhan, ivaknya carmaniṅ kәbo yos baraṇa, iṅǝmbana don, mvaṅ jǝbug arum, sami rinәcah, tәlas, nәhǝr tan kәneṅ turu, riṅ rahinanya, samaṅkana juga sakottamanya, satutugiṅ reh.

kunaṅ phalanya, ilaṅ ikaṅ sarvavyādhi, sarvaduṣṭa, sarvabhaya, sarvabhoga kapaṅguh, kākarṣaṇa rikeṅ rāt, lituhayu paripūrṇa, svarga kapaṅgguh, mvaṅ kaniśrayasan, dulurana ulah rahayu, tan paṅambah laraṅan, matvaṅ riṅ vvaṅ atuha, priyambadapriyәmbhada, tan vāk paruṣya, agәlәm ataṅi, mabrata aṅkǝn ve hayu, mvaṅ katәpǝtaniṅ kasamyajñānan.
M is not complete: it is started by: nyan krama niṅ habratā...saha sasahuṛ; and M: nihan kramaniṅ habratā ... katpǝtaniṅ kasamyajñanan.
in 3.71 in 3.71
madhu parkasparkka tu yadyat bhakṣyaṃbhakṣaṃ, sarvadeva samanvitah, na sthama canarajñatva, sarva deva samānvitaṃ.

Ikaṅ devata hana sanidva, ri saṅ hyaṅ madhu parka, sira juga hiḍәpan raṣananta, kadilihñca mahādeva, arthanya, ikaṅ madhu viṣṇu devatanya, air tәbu brahmā devatanya, pәhan iśvara devatanya, punti mahādeva devatanya.
lavaṇelavaṇo rudrarudram ity uktaṃ, bhr̥ṅgurebhrәmgure śambhursambhu mucyateucyate, pattrāvāsepatraśvaṣā śivo jñeyajñeyah, ity etadetat devatahdevatā sthitah.
div.p: hyaṅniṅ uyah rudra, hyaṅniṅ bhrәm guru, hyaṅniṅ layaṅ sambhu, hyaṅniṅ lva śiva, nihan taṅ devata sanidya, hana riṅ madhu parka.
div.ab: pituhvituh pāpaṃpāpa dahet sarpih, mātuhvituh pāpañ ca madhunammadhūkaṃ, svātipāpaṃsvātipāpa dahet kṣiraṃ, gotrapāpaṃgatraṃpāpaṃ kadalī cakadalisaṃ.
div.p: arthanya, ilaṅ deniṅ air tәbu pāpaniṅ bapa, kavisarja denya, ilaṅ deniṅ madhu parka, pāpaniṅ babu, kavisarja denya, ilaṅ deniṅ pәhan, pāpaniṅ śarīranta, ilaṅ deniṅ punti, pāpaniṅ vvaṅ sanakta kaḍaṅ varga, kavisarja denya, mataṅnyan kayatnakәna deniṅ mantra madhu parka, ma, Om̐ madhu parkampakaṃ idaṃ puṇyaṃpunyaṅ, pavitraṃ pāpa naśanaṃ, ĪśvarenāstiIśvaranagi saṃsr̥taṃsaṅśrәṣṭah, punātipunanti sakalaṃsakalañ jagat, mam̐, piṅ, 3, mamaṅan, piṅ, 3, maśucya.
saha pūjā parikrama karәhǝn, tәhәr aṅupavāsa, vusniṅ pinūjā, aṅabhakti kadi aṅabhaktiniṅ abrat.

ṅhadva kadva kadevye namaḥ, pūr, Om̐ kusuma yuddha mamaka devye namaḥ, da, Om̐ kadārpa daśa padha devye namaḥ svāhā, pa, Om̐ manobhava strī mandha devye namaḥ, ba, Om̐ makara dvajamandoratha devye namaḥ svāhā, u, Om̐ mantra tatu bhaṅga devye namaḥ, ai.
iti saṅ hyaṅ haṣṭa Devî. Om̐ hyaṅ hyaṅniṅ hyaṅ smara devāya namaḥ, Om̐ Indrāya namaḥ, Om̐ Om̐ svaṣṭiya namaḥ.

pratyakṣatvamihaloka, manuṣa tvañca visuka devatvaṃ, sūkṣmatvaṃ sakalatvañca, atmatvañca śariratvaṅ. Eka rūpañca visuka sadanaṃ, candra vatsa tetemekaṃ, trei lokya viyosa śakti. Iśvara vara devañca, brahmājayañja vijayaṃ, mahādeva varatvañca, viṣṇu vijayare vañca. Indra rājaca jayatvaṃ, sarvadevāya ratvañca, sarvadeva devî tattvaṃ, trelokya sevitantah. cittamani mahendraśca, sarvakumara rājatvaṅ, kumara rāja sajñaccā, iṣṭa kamacayaṅ jakaṃ. aṣṭatanvavi patiñca, ugra devaca sajñakaṃ, sarvapāpa haret siddhi, sarvarogha praharaṇaṅ. sarvaśatru vinaśanaṃ.
smarastavā.

nihan kramaniṅ aśeva latri, asūrya śevana kita rumuhun, kadi sadina, huvusniṅ asūrya śevana, mariṅ pamiyosan, aṅarәpakǝn pīta, yan tan hananiṅ pīta, ujuṅaniṅ pisaṅ gәlarәn, śucena rumuhun, yan hananiṅ liṅga mās, salaka kuniṅ, pūjanǝn pratiṣṭa ri ujuṅaniṅ pisaṅ, makādi riṅ pīta, pūjanǝn riṅ kana, gәlarana padmāsana saprakaranya, təkaniṅ deva, pratiṣṭa, utpǝtyakǝn bhaṭāra sakiṅ hr̥dhaya, ma Om̐ mam̐ Am̐ Um̐ namaḥ, iḍǝp saṅ hyaṅ muṅgviṅ liṅga, pūjāni vīja candana, saha sәminiṅ maja, sәkar kunǝṅ, muvah sthityakәna bhaṭāra riṅ liṅga, yan hananiṅ liṅga mās, salaka, yen tan hana salaka, sariniṅ vaduri piṅhe, gavenǝn liṅgakara, mantra sthiti, Om̐ Am̐ Um̐ mam̐ namaḥ, pūjāni rvaniṅ maja, mvaṅ sarvasәkar, candana, vīja, sabhāgyan pūjāniṅ dhūpa, dīpa, ganta, mvaṅ japa ganitri, saha prāṇāyama, saha sǝmbah, liṅanta Om̐ Om̐ liṅga liṅga dipatayei namaḥ, haturana gandhakṣata, puṣpa, dhūpa dīpa, mvaṅ caru, raka vovohan, sәḍah voh, liṅanta aṅaturakǝn, Om̐ Om̐ śivani vedyañca rūm dadami, amr̥ta deva caruvedadami, sa ba ta a i, nama śivāya, a u ma, Om̐. pūjā, piṅ, 3, dukiṅ sore pūrvaka, tәṅah vәṅi, mehniṅ rahina, deniṅ amūjā, tan kantun mantra, Om̐ Om̐ liṅgāye namaḥ, Om̐ sadāśivaṅliṅgāya namaḥ. mehniṅ rahina, ulihakәna sira riṅ antahr̥dhaya, puṇdharika muvah, liṅanta, Om̐ atma liṅggāya namaḥ, Om̐ Om̐ Am̐ mam̐ namaḥ,

yekiṅ mantra pralīna. Om̐ śivāya śiva liṅgāya, śiva sarvomaheśvarah, nama śivāya devāya, sadāśiva namostute. brahmā viṣṇviśvaro devah, sarvajñā parameśvara, utpati sthiti linañcah, liṅga deva namo namaḥ. tuṅgal sthiti sarәpiṅ pralīna.

yen harәp śīva rātri cǝṇdhǝk, liṅanta, Om̐ Om̐ liṅgā liṅgādipataye namaḥ, Om̐ Om̐ atma liṅgāya namaḥ, sǝmbah duk sore, Om̐ Om̐ paramaśiva liṅgāya namaḥ, sǝmbah tәṅah vәṅi, Om̐ Om̐ śūnya liṅgāya namaḥ, sǝmbah meh rahina, sәminiṅ maja pinūjākǝn, sthuti tuṅgal, Om̐ nama śivāya, namo rudrāya, nispada parvatāya, saha sǝmbah sәminiṅ maja kunaṅ.

lviriṅ brata hayva kәnabratayvakәna riṅ tamah, tamah harane turu, yatika kavaśakәna hayvayva lupa, i kālanta mabrata, hayva juga kita aturu ri rahina, hila hila, hilaṅ ulihta mabrata, asiṅ brata anisphala tan pantuka asiṅ sinadya, mataṅnyan kayatnakәna, hayva iman iman, ikaṅ tapa brata agәṅ phalanya, vāhya sukha katәmu donya, ikaṅ kayogiśvaran, kamokṣan phalanya, mataṅnyan hayva cumacadiṅ sira saṅ lumәkasakǝn brata tapa, hayva memeṅeniṅ vvaṅ abrata, hila hila liṅ saṅ hyaṅ.

div.ab:
nihan pabratan, aji sāriniṅ galuṅan, krama bantǝn ri saṅgar, bantǝn śuci adaṇḍanan, riṅ ibu dәṅǝn, paḍa mabuṅkul, riṅ toya abuṅkul, mantra paṅatǝr atәhǝr bhakti maṅavaṅi, ma, Om̐
jayajala pravīra subiṅsubisubiṅ rāt, sugih tan pamaṅun gave, muvah hakaravaṅan, abāṅ rūpanira, sarәṅit gə̄ṅira, ya iku sāriniṅ galuṅan, pinakasamәtoniṅ hulun, siṅ tan vruh sāriniṅ galuṅan, pinakakavulaniṅpinakavudhanan hulun, sabhuvanasa..gat, saravanā, satuṅkǝbiṅ rāt, siṅ aṅavruhi sāriniṅ galuṅān, ya pinakasanakiṅ hulun, pinakasamәtoniṅpinakaka[ka]dhaṅiṅ hulun, sasaṅoniṅ hulun, aṅavruhakǝn sarīniṅ galuṅan, salave lakṣa, salave kṭi, salave hiṅǝlyuta, pinakapasasaṅoniṅ hulun, katәmu maṅkosamaṅko, katәmu tǝmbe, lǝvih katәmu tǝmbelәvih katәmu tәmbe, mәtu salakṣa sadina, Om̐ sa ba ta a i, nama śivāya, a u ma Om̐Om̐ I A Om̐, sa.
nihan pabratan, haji ... A U ma Om̐
in 3.113 in 3.72

nihan brata añārinñarin galuṅān, kramanyakrama, yan kālaniṅ galuṅānmanaṅkәn galuṅan, abantǝn jarimpǝnsarimpәn, saviji sovaṅ, әnahakәna ri harәpiṅ saṅgarharәpiṅ saṅgar, kaṅ riṅ saṅgar kadi kramaniṅ bantǝn kaṅ lagi lagi,harәpiṅ saṅgar, sāmpun marәp muṅgahakәna mariṅ saṅgar, kaṅ riṅ ibu, kaṅ ri tәṅahriṅ pagәneyan, vuhana burat vaṅi, lәṅa vaṅi, mvaṅ bәras, 2, catu, artha, 225, pinūjā saparikrama, taṅ abhakti, vusiṅ aṅabhakti,kadi bantәn sisirih, malih muṅgah riṅ saṅgar, bәras, 2, catu, artha, 225, lә̥ṅa burat vaṅi, yen vus umuja paṅabhakti amaṅan sarimpǝn, ryuvusiṅ amaṅan sarimpǝn, amaṅan sakavaśayen vus aṅabhakti amaṅan haṅinuṅ· sakavasanya. , pūjāniṅ amaṅan sarimpǝnnyan pūjānya, Om̐ paduka bhaṭārī sāriniṅ galuṅan, mānuṣanira kinavruhakǝn sāriniṅ galuṅan, aṅisǝp sāriniṅ rahina, aṅisǝp sāriniṅ vәṅi, aṅisǝp sāriniṅ śrī sādhana, aṅisǝp sarvasārisāriniṅ sarvasāri, aṅisǝp sāriniṅ rāt bhūvana kabehsarvabhuvana, sakabeh riṅ hulun, hulun vruh sāriniṅ galuṅan vruh sariniṅ galuṅan, andadi ya bhujaṅgga lәvih, akaḍaṅ araturatu, sukha sugih śarīraniṅ hulun, anak anak akeḍәpakanaka keḍәp, aputu abuyut, tumus tumǝrus, təkaniṅ anak putu buyutiṅ hulun, katəkana sapinakṣaniṅ hulun, saṅ hyaṅ triyodaśa sakṣi, anakṣeniṅ hulun, phalanya, siṅ kāryanta anәmu hayu, kinasihan deniṅkinasihan bhūta dәṅǝn, mvaṅ jәnǝk sahisiniṅ pomahan.
nihan bratā hañarin ... sahisiniṅ pomahan
in 3.73 in 3.113

hana brata asusukhan, ṅa, riṅ pūrṇamaniṅ kapitu, piṅ, 7, sarahina, piṅpi 7, savәṅi, amaṅanamaṅana aṅinum, aṅigәl, bhaṭāra kapitu maveh brata, pha, sukha sugih, anak amitra, dīrgha yuśa, keḍәp kapintuhukapituhu.
hana bratāsusukan ... keḍǝp kapituhu
in 3.75 in 3.146 in 3.95
hana brata dinulaṅ riṅ lek pituṅ lek, samayanya, pha, kinasihaniṅ rāt.
hana brata malaṅ lek deny amaṅan, deny aṅǝpǝl, pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, subhaga kinasihaniṅ strīistrī.

hana brata mahucandra, ṅa, sabran maśoca yen masipat, ṅuniveh buddha irәṅ, mvaṅ radityadite manis, ṅuniveh sari sarikәna, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik bade hyaṅnya, satahun tigaṅ lek samayanya, pha, māsih saṅ hyaṅ candrāditya, tan lamur katon ahayu, mvaṅ pinicaḍaṅ.
hana bratā mahucandrā ... mvaṅ pinicaḍaṅ
in 3.112 in 3.78

hana brata ṅlintaṅ, ṅa, tan pamaṅanpamaṅana, yan tan mәtu lintaṅ pipitu sanak, lama tәṅah śaśihatәṅah śasih samayanya, pha, sugih dlāha, tur rūpānta tan akusut.
hana bratā ṅlintaṅ ... tan ākusut
in 3.79 in 3.109

hana brata, sore amaṅan vus apasaṅ sande juga, brata tan pasuluh, ṅa, ya pinakarūpa, pinakavuvusiṅ padha vvaṅ, pha, siṅ sādhyanta katəkan.
hana bratta, sore ... sadyanta katkan
in 3.80 in 3.73

hana brata tan pamaṅan ḍavuh tәlu, tan paṅinaṅ tan paṅinum vai, lamun huvusiṅ ḍavuh tiga, vәnaṅ aṅinaṅ amaṅan aṅinum, satahun divasanya, pha, sugih bhuvana, tur apәkik kaṅ rūpa.
hana brata tan ... apkikaṅ rūpā
in 3.81

hana brata, amaṅan naṅkǝn ḍavuh tәlu, amaṅan, aṅinum, kavaśa aṅinaṅ, pha, sukha sugih, sәḍǝṅ anom, anulus riṅ niṣkala.
hana bratā, hamaṅan ... riṅ niskalā
in 3.82

hana brata
ṅayu aṅyu ,
ṅa haranya , tan
pamaṅan pamaṅana
tatkālaniṅ tәkaniṅ
saṅeṅe kulon, mvaṅ
sakihupiṅ sakiṅ hupi
hyaṅ
prabhaṅkara prbhaṅkara hyaṅniṅ brata , satahun samayanya, hyaṅ prabhaṅkāra hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, hevanā mamūkti, siddha sāprayojñananta .
hana bratā, ṅayu ... sidḍa sāprayojñananta
in 3.83 in 3.108

hana brata, amaṅan riṅ paturon, sәḍǝṅ kumarañcaṅ sǝṅeṅe, pha, drәman alaki.
hana bratā, hamaṅan ... dr̥man halāki
in 3.84

hana brata aṅǝmbaṅaṅǝṅbaṅ sabran manis, sarvakǝmbaṅ kiṅumpulakǝn, lavankarapun uyah arәṅ, suruh pupucuk, yen amaṅan riṅ paturon, marәpiṅ ulon, yan amaṅan ḍavuh pisan, pha, pәkik akvehakeh ulaṅunakǝn, yen strīistri aṅulahakǝn, drәmanadr̥man alaki, kinasihan riṅ paturon, marәpiṅ hulon yen amaṅankita tәmbe, tur tan panәmu ki maru .
hana brata haṅǝṅbaṅ ... hyen āmaṅan
in 3.94 in 3.85

hana brata antara bakta, ṅa, amaṅan kāla tәṅah ṅvetәṅaṅe, yaniṅ vәṅi sәḍǝṅ sirәpiṅ voṅ, limaṅ lek lavasanya, pha, tisan kuras, sukha gə̄ṅ de saṅ paṇḍita.
hana bratta hantara ... saṅ pāṇḍita
in 3.86

hana brata, añjayaañjayaṅe, ṅakramanya, tan pamaṅan yan liṅsir, satahunsavarṣa pituṅ dinalek samayanyalavasanya, saṅ hyaṅ kr̥ta bhuvana hyaṅniṅ bratahyaṅnya, pha, kr̥ta kaṅtaṅ rāt, manuh kaṅ maraṇaprәmana, siddhi kanisihan deniṅkinasihaniṅ hyaṅ, kineriṅan deniṅ sarvagalak.
hana brata, hañjaya ... saṛvva galak
in 3.78 in 3.87 in 3.94

hana brata anrusnrus tuñjuṅ, ṅa, yaniṅyan riṅ pūrṇamaniṅ kapitu, adyus, piṅ, 7pitu, sarahina, piṅ, 7, savәṅimvaṅ riṅ vәṅi, yan paṅloṅ, piṅ, 14, haśeva latrī, acaru śuci sadaṇdhanan, bhaṭāra guru hyaṅniṅ bratahyaṅnya, pha, savighnanta hilaṅ, tur kinasihan deniṅ bhūta ḍәṅǝn, kinasihaniṅ tuhantuhvantuvan mvaṅ samanta janma.
hana bratā nrus ... samanta janmā
in 3.88 in 3.127

hana brata, anrusnrus tuñjuṅ, ṅa, aturu aṅadǝg savәṅi, bhaṭāra śiva maveh brata, pha, śakti, sasarnya dadi ratu, sugih, tan hilaṅalaṅ takonakәnakatakonakәna, maṅgǝhmagәhmaṅgә maṅәh i deśa, nora voṅrvaṅ siddhi gave.
hana bratā hanrus ... sidḍi gave
in 3.89 in 3.143 in 3.87; 3.94

hana brata anrus tuñjuṅ, ṅa, ri taṅgal kapiṅ limaniṅ kapitu, amati agnighni, nĕhǝr tan kәneṅ paṅan turu, sarahina, savәṅi, bhaṭāra aśih prāṇa hyaṅiṅ brata, pha, śakti, amupu sāriniṅ brata kabeh.
hana bratta nrus ... brata kabeh
in 3.90

hana brata anrusnrus tuñjuṅ, ṅa, madyus piṅ tiga savәṅi, piṅ pitu sarahina, yan aturu sumaṇḍah, pha, vruh saguṇaniṅ voṅ kabeh, apәkik tan hana maḍani, tur prajurit pinakahuluniṅ sajagat.
hana bratta nrus ... huluniṅ sajagat
in 3.91

hana brata, anrusnrus tuñjuṅ, ṅa, adyus piṅ tiga savәṅi, piṅ tiga sarahina, tan paturu gumuliṅ, sumaṇḍah vәnaṅ, satahun divasanya, pha, vruh satata guṇaniṅ voṅ kabeh, prajurit apәkik tan hana maḍani, pinakahuluniṅ sañjata, savarṇaniṅ bhuvana norana maḍa, sanūsāntara kabeh tumiṅhaliṅ sira.ś
hana brata, nrus ... tumiṅhal iṅ sira
in 3.92

hana brata, anrusnrusadyus tuñjuṅ, ṅa, madyus piṅ pitu sarahina, piṅ pitu savәṅi, pha, lituhayulistuhayu paripūrṇa, kaṅgapiṅ ratu, kinasihan deniṅ saṅ paṇḍitapaṇḍita.
hana brata, nrus ... saṅ pāṇḍita
in 3.93 in 3.124

hana brata, anrusnrus tuñjuṅ, ṅa, adyusadus, piṅ, 7, sarahina, mvaṅ riṅ vәṅi, asisirih kita, naṅkǝn vulan aguṅ, pha, vruh tan aga saparipolahta, bhuvana geger tumon iri kita.
hana bratā, nrus... hiri kitthā
in 3.94

hana brata trisandya, ṅa, amaṅan tigaṅ kәpǝl, sarahina, tigaṅ tahun samayanya, pha, mantukiṅ svarga bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ lituhayulistvayu paripūrṇa, sukha magə̄ṅ.
hana brata tri ... suka magə̄ṅ
in 3.95

hana brata, trisandhyaatri ndhya, ṅa, madyus piṅ tiga sarahinapiṅ tiga dyus iṅ rahinapiṅ tiga adyus sarahina, mvaṅ riṅ vәṅimviṅi kulәmmvaṅ riṅ, vusiṅ adyus asusurahuvusniṅ adyus masisigvuniṅ adyus, asisig, masipatamasipat, mañurat, pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, mulihiṅmulih mari kendranmulih riṅ kendran kendran, sasarnya mandadimanja_ _ _ vvaṅriṅ vvaṅ lituhayulistuhayu paripūrṇa prajñanprajña ya.
hana brata, tri ... paripuṛṇna prajñan X
in 3.54 in 3.96 in 3.53

hana brata, kraca adyus, ṅa, adyus sarahina vәṅi, lǝṅa sipatnyacipatnya, pha, svarga mantuk riṅ kendranmantuk riṅ svarga riṅ kendran, majanmamañjanma vicakṣaṇa anulus, tur anom apәkikapәkik anvam kalah alatan pavicara.
hana bratta, kraca ... kala hāla
in 3.97 in III………….

hana brata, amaṅan sarvamǝntah, bhagavān aṅgaṣṭi hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, dadi deva, sasarnya dadi ratu, kinasihaniṅ hyaṅ, prajurit aṅalahakǝn śatru kabeh, norāna maḍanana, tan kәna seh abrata.
hana bratta, hamaṅan... kna sehabrata
in 3.98

hana brata aśuci lakṣaṇa, ṅa, tan pamaṅan yan duruṅ ararahup, alǝlәṅaalәṅha, pha, apәkik kerәṅan, saparipolihiṅ abrata, lәvǝsiṅlәvas rambut, asәḍǝpiṅ paṅūcap, mvaṅ rūpā.
hana bratā haśuci ... mvaṅ rūpā
in 3.99 in 3.71

hana brata, nuci lakṣaṇa, ṅa, amaṅan ahes karuhun, pha, kerәṅan saparipolahta, alit arampiṅ, drәman alaki.
hana brata, nuci ... dr̥mman alaki
in 3.100

hana brata, mavastra śuddha malasuddha mala, mantranyaiti mantranya, ma, Om̐ śuddha pāpa, śuddha mala, 3, śuddha śuddha pinariśuddha, śuddha śuddha pinarivastuŌm. phalanya, hilaṅ malā patakā, pāpa kaleśantakleśan, samayanya kaṅ bratasamayaniṅ brata, tigaṅ daśa dina30, dina, anambut riṅ tilǝmmanaṅgap riṅ tilәm, asalah riṅ tilǝm, asalah brata, sah sәkar rvaniṅ śuddha malaśuddha mala, pәtekakәna rvanya, mañomponi petaṅan mantranyamacaru śuci saḍanḍanan.
hana bratā, mavastra ... petaṅan mantranyā
in 3.101 in 3.130

hana bratabrata andaka rūpa, ṅa, yan taṅgal piṅ, 1apisan, taṅgal piṅ, 2pindo, taṅgal piṅ, 3piṅ tәlu, akambǝn śuddha mala, avastraastra saci, yan vus alabahanahabahan, pha, rūpanta lañjartan kasoran rūpanta, apәkik paripūrṇa, yan lanaṅ abrata, kalamar deniṅ strī, yan istri, kalamar deniṅ kakuṅ, andaka rūpa haraniṅ brata maṅkana.dira prajñan
hana bratā, yan ... bratā maṅkana
in 3.102 in 3.126

hana brata malāhāra, ṅa, yan amaṅan maṅgis, duryan, sakalviriṅ vovohan, tigaṅ lek samayanya, pha, mantuk mariṅ svarga bhaṭāra guru, mvaṅ bhaṭāra saḍāśiva, sasarnya majanma riṅ vvaṅ sugih sujana.
hana bratta malahāra ... sugih sujanā
in 3.103

hana brata ṅinaṅ suruh tәmu ros, jambe taṅ vәnaṅ tampakiṅ ladiṅ, ginitik, suruh lǝmbaran, apuh bubuk, pha, tәguh tan pakәmitan, tur keḍәp.
hana bratā ṅinaṅ ... tuṛ kkeḍǝp
in 3.104

hana brata, tan pamaṅan jambe tan sinigarsinigi deniṅriṅ ladiṅ, pha, tan tǝtǝsmarasatәkәs deniṅ sarvalaṇḍǝpnon lalaṇḍәpsarvalalaṇḍәp, jaya ri yuddha tan kevǝhanjaya riṅ baya, mvaṅ akveh asi, saṅ hyaṅ kālajaya riṅ yuddha tan kevәh.
hana bratā, tan ... tan kevǝhan
in 3.77 in 3.105 in 3.93

hana brata, maharen vatu, deniṅ abrata, tәluṅ tahun, pha, tәguh bhujabhujana kulit, tur kәlar.
hana brata, maharen ... tuṛ klar
in 3.106

hana brata, maṅan sakpәlǝl, lavasnya pituṅ vәṅi, pha, kinasihaniṅ rāt kita.
hana brata, maṅan ... rat kita
in 3.107

hana brata maṅan roṅ kәpǝl, lamanya pituṅ vәṅi, pha, guṇa tan kevǝhan.
hana brata maṅan ... tan kevǝhan
in 3.108

hana brata, maṅanamaṅan tigaṅ kәpǝl, tigaṅ vәṅi lavasnya, pha, kinasihan deniṅ rāt, imbuh imbuh tan paṅloṅimba imbuhan pahloṅ.
hana bratā, maṅan ... tan paṅloṅ
in 3.109 in 3.104

hana brata trisamaya, ṅa, amaṅan sәga tigaṅ kәpǝl, salek samayanya, saṅ hyaṅ tiga maveh brata, pha, kinasihaniṅ paṇḍita, guṇamvaṅ guṇa mantra siddhi.
hana bratā tri... mantra sidḍi
in 3.110 in 3.81

hana brata, trisamayatrisamana, ṅa, amaṅan tigaṅ kәpǝl, sarahina, tigaṅ tahun samayanya, pha, mantuk iṅ padasvarga bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasarnya mañjanmamaṅjanma riṅ vvaṅ lituhayulistvayu paripūrṇa, suka magə̄ṅ.
hana bratta, tri ... suka magə̄ṅ
in 3.111 in 3.50

hana brata, ekabhaktaekabhakti, ṅa, amaṅan sakәpǝlamaṅan sakәpәl tәkaniṅ sari-sari, pituṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, prih meṅgal katәmu.
hana brata, Eka ... meṅgal katmu
in 3.112 in 3.32

hana brata, maṅanamaṅan pituṅ kәpǝl, pituṅ dina lavasnya, bhaṭāra gaṇa veh brata, pha kinasihan deniṅ rāt kabehgaṇa katapakanya
hana bratta, maṅan ... ghaṇa katapākanya
in 3.113 in 3.103

hana brata, amaṅan ro vәlas kǝpǝl, pha, siddha kārya, amukti ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana bratā, ahamaṅan … brata maṅkana
in 3.114

hana brata, amaṅan kupat kǝpǝt, mevaka sarvaśuci, 3, vәṅi divasanya, aṅalakimadā, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ Iśvara sira turun brata, ya minakarūpa sira, pinakaśvaraniṅ aṅiduṅ, manisiṅ panutukan, brahmāṇi asuṅ rontal, pha, labdhavara riṅ rāt, makveh asih iri kita.
hana brata, hamaṅan ... hasihi ri kitthā
in 3.115

hana brata, amaṅan kupat kǝpǝl, tuṅgal ivaknya sarvaśuci, tigaṅ vәṅi divasanya, aṅali pada, ṅa, hyaṅ iśvara turun abrata, pha, ya pinakarūpa, pinakaśvaraniṅ aṅiduṅ, manisiṅ paṅūcap.
hana brata, hamaṅan ... manisiṅ paṅucap
in 3.116

hana brata, amaṅan kupat kǝpǝl, pituṅ viji, amaṅan rahina, esuk sore , tәṅaṅ ṅve, titiga, sore, roro, ivaknya isiniṅ loh, salek lavasnya, pha, rinakṣa deniṅ ratu, kinasihan deniṅ voṅ sukha tǝmbe.
hana brata, hamaṅan ... suka tǝmbe
in 3.117

hana brata, amaṅan sakәpǝl, tatkālaniṅtatəkalaniṅ taḍahan sapulukan, pituṅ vәṅi lavasan ika, pha, kinasihaniṅ rāt, mvaṅ jana nurāga, ekaki ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana bratā, hamaṅan... brata maṅkana
in 3.118

hana brata, aturu aṅadǝg, sabhāgya yen aṅeka pāda pisan, pituṅ vәṅi samayanya, yen kita amaṅan sakәpǝl sarahina, yan aṅinum bañu sahĕlǝd, tәluṅ dina, tәluṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, sapocapan riṅ deva, byakta śakti tәkeṅ kamokṣan.
hana bratā, haturū ... tkeṅ kamokṣan
in 3.119

hana brata, maṅan rvaṅ kәpǝl, pituṅ vәṅi lavasanya, guṇa mogha dataṅ, tan kevuhan, phalanya, anidrā ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana bratā, maṅan ... bratā maṅkana
in 3.120

hana brata maṅan tigaṅ kәpǝl, trimasa, tiga vәṅi lavasanya, pha, kinasihaniṅ rāt, trisamaya ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana bratta maṅan ... brata maṅkāna
in 3.121

hana brata, amañcagǝma, ṅa, amaṅan sәga limaṅ kәpǝl sari sari, limaṅ leklek paveh samayanya, pha, kinasihan deniṅ samantakinasihaniṅ sama janma, kaṣṭaguṇankaśruguṇakasrugun, kavīryavan, kasubhāgyan sugih siddhi mantra.
hana bratā, hamañca ... sidḍi mantra
in 3.122 in 3.82

hana brata, maṅan pituṅ kәpǝl, sapta latri lavasanya, guṇa moga ḍatәṅ, sarvaviṣyasarvaviṣa tan kataman kita, yeka phalanya, catur mukha ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana bratā, maṅan ... brata maṅkana
in 3.123

hana brata, maṅanamaṅan pituṅ kәpǝlkәpәl, ṅakәpәl sarahina, pataṅ lekpәtaṅ lek samayanya, pha, amuktimukti sukha riṅ dlāhariṅ dlāhantakiteṅ dlāhariṅ dlānta.
hana bratta, hamaṅān ... riṅ dlāha
in 3.55 in 3.124 in 3.54 in 3.63, 3.65

hana brata, amaṅan saṅaṅ kәpǝl, naṅkәn pūrṇama, mṛtiāhāramrәtihara, ṅa, moliha tigaṅ kasaṅa, pha, mantuk mariṅ svarga bhaṭāra indra, sasarnya mañjanma mariṅ vvaṅ lituhayulistvayu paripūrṇa, sugih saṅkan rare.
hana bratā, hamaṅan ... saṅkan rare
in 3.125

hana brata maṅan sadaśa kәpǝl, taḍah pisan, sadaśa lek lavasanya, pha, salvirniṅ lara rogha tan tame kita, aṅadhava ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana brata maṅan ... brata maṅkana
in 3.126

hana brata, aṅapitu, ṅa, amaṅan pituṅ kәpǝl, moliha tigaṅ kapitu, pha, mantuk riṅ bhaṭāra brahmā, sasarnya majanma riṅ vvaṅ sugih saṅkan rare, lituhayulistvayu paripūrṇa.
hana brata, haṅapitu ... listvayu paripuṛṇna
in 3.127

hana brata, naṅkǝn radite umanismanis, amaṅan sǝga sakәpǝlsakәpәl, tәluṅ radite Umanistәka roṅ radite amaṅan roṅ kәpәl, tәka tәluṅ radite amaṅan tigaṅ kәpәl, pha, tis manak anak, tәrus tumus təkaniṅ anak putu buyut, sukha sugih tan kabañcanakavicara.
hana brata, naṅkǝn ... tan kabañcana
in 3.128 in 3.100

hana brata añәkul bañu, ṅa, kramanya, amaṅan sәga sakәpǝl, sadina, beñjaṅanya rvaṅ kәpǝl, puhanannyavuvananya, 3, kәpǝl, tәlunanya malabahan, mantraniṅ amaṅanma Om̐ nirogha, nirpāpa, nirmala, niṅ bape bunirmala nirbape bu lukar mulih jati nityasā. amaṅan tan pahuyah, tan paivak, kneṅ dyus kevalā, tan kneṅ lisah, tan kǝneṅ vәḍak, tan paṅinum tuvak, tan paṅinaṅtan paṅinum salvir amuroni, tan aṅinaṅ sәrәh, tan paturu riṅ rahina, tan kabañcaran, pha, hilaṅ salviriṅ lararara roga.
hana bratā tañkul ... larā rogha
in 3.129 in 3.58

manih brata añәkulñәkul bañu, riṅ cәkokiṅ taṅan paṅan sәga sakәpǝl, toya sacәkokiṅ taṅan, tigaṅ dina samayanya, sabhāgya, 5, dina, ma, kәbas valuya jāti. pha, nirlara vighna.
manih bratta ñkul ... nirlāra vighna
in 3.130

hana brata añәkulñәkul bañu, śa, vaḍahnyavaḍah daḍasar cәmǝṅ, ma, Om̐ hana boloṅ tan pahudǝranpahederan, ana boloṅ tan pamala, nirvighna nirtaṅisnirvighnaniṅ taṅis, Om̐ śrī srīya namaḥ svāhā, Om̐ mam̐ya namaḥ svāhā. amita ri saṅ asәḍahan brata, riṅri saṅgar, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvarāya namaḥ svāha.
hana bratā ñkul bañu ... namaḥ svāhā
in 3.131 in 3.60 in 3.67

hana brata añәkul bañu, ṅa, amaṅan sacalovakaniṅ taṅan, pituṅ vәṅi samayanya, nasi kalavan bañu, ma, Om̐ nirroga, nirpāpa nirbapebu, lukǝṅ mulih jatinyasah, lukar sapāpaniṅ śarīra, mvaṅ pāpaniṅ bapebu.
hana bratāñkul bañu ... pāpaniṅ bapebu
in 3.132 in 3.69

hana brata ñәkul bañu, mañjiṅ lima, ṅa, puluṅ kaṅ sәkul, 1, inumi bañu, 1, malih amuluṅ sәkul, 1, inumi bañu, piṅ tәlu hiṅane, raris amaṅan, sakarәpiṅ amaṅan vәnaṅ, vusaniṅ amaṅan, ṅinum bañu, raris akәmuh avajik, aṅinaṅ, mariṅ vĕtǝṅi voṅ, samaṅkana uga kramanya, sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, uttama lavasnya satahun, ma, Om̐ hana boloṅ tan pamala, hana boloṅ tan paundǝran, nirvighna nirtaṅis nirroga, nirupadrava, niṅ mala malina, pha, hilaṅ sarvamalaniṅ śarīranta, kinasihan deniṅ saṅ prabhu, mvaṅ deva sih iri kita.
hana brata ñkul ... iri kitthā
in 3.60 in 3.133

hana bratamantraniṅmamantrabrata añәkul bañuanәkulñәkulmañәkul, ma, saṅ drәmba moha, sirasih, maṅanaamaṅana riṅ pasarmariṅ pajagalanriṅ pajagalan saṅ kāla viṣaya, sirasaṅ kāl viṣaya sira amaṅana riṅ pasar maṅana mariṅ pajudenamaṅan riṅ pajuden, saṅ kāla ṅaḍaṅ, sira maṅanaama ṅanaamaṅana riṅmariṅ dalan guṅ, saṅ kāla katuṅkәtuṅ, sira maṅanaamaṅanamaṅana riṅ pajagalanmariṅ pasarpasar aguṅriṅ pajuden, vusanira amaṅanri uvus adyusa rumuhunri vuvus sira amaṅan aṅinumvus sira amaṅan, muliha mariṅ rāga valunaniṅ hulunmakaramasa, masisiga, marvi-rvihansira muliha mariṅ rāga valunakveṅ hulunmuliha sira riṅ rāga valuniṅ hulun, rovaṅaniṅ hulun makārya hayurovaṅaniṅ hulun hamaṅun hayurovaṅaniṅ hulun hamaṅan kārya hayu, Om̐ siddhir astu.
hana bratta ñkul ... Om̐ sidḍi rastu
in 3.61 in 3.134 in 3.57 in 3.68

hana brata tan paṅinum bañu, tatkālaniṅ amaṅan, yan kaśrәdhǝp, atәlasan pisan kita maṅan , pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, tan asǝrәt kaṅ sinadyanta, mogha mrih iri kita.
hana bratā tan ... mrih iri kita
in 3.135

hana brata tan paṅinum bañu, satahun divasanya, pha, śakti, hyaṅ padma hyaṅniṅ brata.
hana bratta tan ... hyaṅniṅ bratā
in 3.136

hana brata amaṅan avaḍah goḍoṅ, sinaṅga riṅ taṅan kiva, tan pavuvuh, pha, kinasihan deniṅ rāt, vәkasan tan paṅinum bañu, sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, siddha sādhya phalanya.
hana brata hamaṅan ... sadyā phalanya
in 3.137

hana brata amaṅanmaṅan tan paimbuhpembuh, pituṅ tahun samayanya, pha, bhoga gәṅ təkamagәṅ tinәmuntameṅgal katәmu.
hana brata hamaṅan ... gə̄ṅ tka
in 3.138 in 3.21 in 3.56, 3.57

Hana brata, tan dady atambǝh, pituṅ vәṅi lavasanya, medhā prajā siddha kārya phalanya, aniraṅ ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana brata, tan ... bratā maṅkana
in 3.139

hana brata tan pavuvuh, tan paṅinum bañu, lamun sāmpun aṅinaṅ, aṅinum bañu vәnaṅ, sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, pha, prajurit kita.
hana bratā tan ... prajurit kittha
in 3.140

hana brata amaṅana ron, sinaṅga tan patәḍa tan pavuvuh, tigaṅ vәṅi lavasnya, padma raṅkǝp, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ capuriṅ rāt sira turun abrata, pinakagulu jariji suku, tәhәr kinasihaniṅ rāt.
hana brata hamaṅanāron ... kinasihaniṅ rāt
in 3.141

hana brata amaṅan tan pavuvuh, pituṅ vәṅi lavasnya, siddha kārya, kinasihaniṅ rāt phalanya.
hana bratā hamaṅan ... rāt phalanya
in 3.142

hana brata amaṅan papa davun, sinaṅga riṅ taṅan kiva, tan patәḍa tan patambǝh, hyaṅ ekṣasaṇa turun abrata, pha, kinasihaniṅ rāt.
hana brata hamaṅān ... kinasihaniṅ rāt
in 3.143

hana brata tan dady atambǝh, pituṅ vәṅi lavasanya, medhā prajā siddha kārya phalanya, anira ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana bratā tan... brata maṅkana
in 3.144
hana brata, yan amaṅan tan patәḍa tan patambǝh, pha, tan paśatru kita riṅ niṣkala.
hana brata mona, ṅa, yan amaṅan tan paṅucap, tigaṅ tahun samayanya, bhaṭāra rudra hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ rudrāya namaḥ, pamit, pha, kinatvaṅan deniṅ jagat, siddha saprayojanantasaprayojñānanta.
hana brata, maṅan amona, tan paṅinum bañu, vusiṅ amaṅan aṅinum bañu, aṅūcapakәna, pha, tan kәna gǝgǝriṅangәgәriə̄n, viśeṣa riṅ bhūmi, keḍәp kapintuhu, pituṅ śaśih divasanya.
hana brata, monāraka, tan paṅucap lamun amaṅan, tәluṅ tahun samayanya, bhaṭāra rudra hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, ginañjar deniṅ hyaṅ kabeh, guṇa təka.
hana brata, mona maṅan. mona nap. mona muris. mona susur. mona bhasma. mona napuh. mona ṅisiṅ.
div.p: kunaṅ mulihiṅ mona,
mona maṅan, pha, vicakṣaṇa dīrgha yuṣa kita.
mona nap, pha, kinasihan deniṅ rāt, prabhu viku.
mona bhasma, pha, mantuk iṅ bhaṭārī rātri, sasarnya majanma riṅ viku śakti.
mona napuh, pha, kinasihaniṅ paṇḍita, mvaṅ deva prabhu, rahayu riṅ pañjanmanta.
mona ṅisiṅ, pha, prih meṅgal katәmu, bahu siṣya kita.
mona sisig, pha, jaya kāryanta, prabha kiteṅ kamokṣan.
mona muris, pha, siddha kāryanta, pinrihta muna təka.

div.ab: hana brata, pañca mukha, ṅa, naṅkǝn kalivon amona sasore, aṅraṅkus brata kabeh, pha, amaṅgih sukha magә̄ṅ, majanma riṅ sugih sәkul amukti saṅkan rare, keḍәp deniṅ rāt kabeh.

hana brata ṅunir, ṅa, yan amaṅan sәkul kinuniran, lavasnya sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, bhaṭāra mahādeva hyaṅnya, pha, mulih mariṅ svarga bhaṭāra mahādeva, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ dam puvavaṅ, sugih dana hulun, labdhavara ri saṅ ahulun.
hana brata amaṅan kuñit, makalalab, amanah kañcana, ṅa, pha, sugih mās.

hana brata, aṅuniṅ, ṅa, sәkul kuniṅ juga pinaṅan, yan tan maṅkana, kunir juga makalalab, pituṅ tahun samayanya, bhaṭārī ratih hyaṅiṅ brata, pha, mantuk iṅ svarga bhaṭāra mahādeva, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ dam puvavaṅ śakti.
hana brata ṅuniṅ, ṅaṅuniṅ, kunir paṅan rumuhunpaṅan rumuhun, saleksavulan lavasnya, ma, Om̐ niryāya namaḥ svāhānirya namaḥ svāhā.

app.note:
hana bratā ṅuniṅ, ... namaḥ svāha
in III.154 in III.76

div.ab: hana brata, ambhīma, ṅa, yan amaṅan mevaka uyah, satahun tigaṅ lek divasanya, bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvarāya namaḥ, pamit, pha, siṅ pinrih meṅgal katәmu, kinasihan de saṅ paṇḍita, mvaṅ deva bhūta sih iri kita.
hana brata ambhīmambhīma, ṅa, yan taṅgal, piṅ 12, riṅ kapitu, amatiāhāraamatihara, pha, suka vrәddhi, tur siddhi mantra, jayeṅ śatru, keḍәp kapintuhu deniṅ rat, amupu saprajāniṅ voṅ kabeh.

hana brata ambhīma, ṅa, yan amaṅan mevaka uyah, putihiṅ taluh, baṅ pәtak, pa, amaṅan kәtan baṅ, bavaṅ baṅ, pva, amaṅan sәga kuniṅ, mevaka kuniṅiṅ taluh, va, amaṅan kәtan irәṅ, mevaka bakula, ka, amaṅana sәga aamañca varṇa, meveka salvirnya, pha, sugih mās salaka, mvaṅ vәsi
hana brata mona turu sumaṇḍah, tigaṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭāra viṣṇu hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ um̐ um̐ viṣṇuve namaḥ, pha, labdhavara kita, mandi sakәcapta.
hana brata turu sumaṇḍahsumaṇḍyah, ṅa, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra sambhu maveh brata, pha, apәkik kavovanankevanan taja kula.

app.note:
hanā bratta turu ... tajā kulā
in III.159 in III.86

div.ab: hana brata, aṅumbhakarṇahumbhakarṇa, ṅa, yan aturu, miriṅ satahun, roṅ tahun samayanya, devāntara hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ devantarāya namaḥ, pamit, pha, putra vr̥ddhi, pamәtik vәnaṅ vәnaṅ mada śih sama vr̥ddhi.

hana brata, kumavaśa, ṅa, aṅupavāśa, pituṅ kulǝmvәṅi tan kәneṅkәna riṅ riṅ turunidrā rahina vәṅiriṅ rahina vәṅi, pha, viryavan, siddha sakāryantasiddha sakahyunta, tan pamaṅgih kevǝhsiddha kapaṅgih.
hana bratta, kumavaśa ... pamaṅgih kevǝh
in III.161 in III.83

hana brata, niṅibu, ṅa, amaṅan sarvaibu, pataṅ lek divaśanya, pha, mulih riṅ svarga bhaṭāra rudra, sasarnya majanma riṅ kula, saṅ kumbhakarṇa, aturu tan paṅlihan, rahin vәṅi tur aṅupavāśa, pha, keḍәp saparipolahta.

hana brata, tan pamaṅanpaṅan tan paturu, saṅbrata saṅ hyaṅ tan kaviśeṣa,kaviśeṣan hyaṅnya, phaṅa, phalnya, svarga titisnya.
hana brata, tan ... svaṛggā titisnya
in III.164 in III.113

hana brata, lәvih turu, ṅa, tan trәṣṇeṅ paṅān, bhaṭārī keśava hyaṅiṅ bratahyaṅnya, pha, mantuk riṅ svargasvargan bhaṭāra śiva, mañjanma ri kulaputra, luputiṅ lara vighna, subhaga anulus.
hana bratā, l̥vih ... subhāga hanulus
in III.165 in III.116
hana brata, mopavāsa pituṅ rātri, atәhәr tan kәneṅ turu rahina vәṅi, bhaṭāra śīva hyaṅiṅ brata, ma, Om̐ nāma śivāya, pamit, pha, vīryavanviyavan , pha, sakāryanta siddha, tәhәr siddhi

hana brata ambīraambhirambira, ṅa, yan amaṅan mevakamevaka uyah kevala, satahun tigaṅ lek samayanyalavasnya mvaṅ tigaṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭāra iśvara hyaṅnya,bhaṭāreśvara hyaṅnya ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvarāya namaḥ pha, siṅ prihprihsiṅ pinrih meṅgaleṅgal katәmu, kinasihiṅ rāt kita,tur kinasihan deniṅ rāt mvaṅ deva bhūta sih iri kitadeva bhūta sih iri kitatur kinasihan deniṅ deva bhūta.
hana brata ambhira... kita
in III.167 in III.30 in III.13
hana brata aṅlavar, ṅa, tan pamaṅaniṅ uyahan, satahun divasanya, bhaṭāra śaṅkara hyaṅnya, pha, mulih riṅ kendran, sasarnya majanma riṅ lituhayulistvayu prajña kita.

hana brata, ṅlavar, ṅa, tan pamaṅan uyah, pat vulan pәtaṅ vәṅi samayanya, bhaṭāra śaṅkara hyaṅnya, pha, mantuk mariṅ kendran, sasarnya mañjanma lituhayu paripūrṇa.
hana brata, ṅlavar ... listuhayu paripuṛṇnā
in III.169 in III.81
hana brata, aṅupavāsa, ṅa, lamun amaṅan aṅgugut uyah arәṅ rumuhun, 3, tahun divasanya, bhaṭārī gaṅga hyaṅniṅ brata, ma, Om̐ gaṅgāyaigaṅgāya nama svāhā, pha, saparipolahta kinerәṅan deniṅ jagat.

hana brata, maṅan tumpǝṅ ivak uyah harәṅ, bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṅnya, ya pinakarūpa, pinakaśvaraniṅ kiduṅ carita, pha, manisiṅ panutukan.
hana brata, maṅan ... manisiṅ panutukan
in III.171 quite similiar, but different in the technique and the result. Here is the P: hana brata maṅan tumpәṅ ivaknya huyah harәṅ, pәtaṅ tavun samayanya, kinasihan deniṅ padhanta janma
hana brata, amaṅan kǝmbaṅ, naṅkǝn, U, ivak uyah harәṅ, vusiṅ amaṅan, aṅinaṅ suruh pupucuk, aṅliṅga kǝmbaṅ, ṅa, pha, sukha sugih, rūpa aheṅ.
hana brata, amaṅan tan pauyah, pituṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, śaktinta ḍatәṅ, tәhәr kinatvaṅan deniṅ hyaṅ.
hana brata, amaṅan arasotih, ṅa, aḍahar uyah harәṅ minakavulam, lama pituṅ dina, ra Nini paduka bhaṭārī śarasoti hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, prajñan.
nihan kr̥ta māsa, ṅa, hayuniṅ hulun, sakārya hayu, makadi vatǝk abrata, nūt avarah,
div.p: śaśih ka, 1, taṅ, piṅ, 10, saṅ hyaṅ vīra kusuma devatanya, bratanya, hayva maṅan sarvabuṅkah, pha, sugih anom drәman avǝvәka ta sira.
śaśih, 2, taṅ, piṅ, 7, saṅ hyaṅ jaya kusuma devatanya, bratanya hayva maṅan sapi, pha, luputeṅ tuju tәluh tarañjana, drәman ahiven iven.
śaśih, 3, taṅ, piṅ, 9, saṅ hyaṅ naka devatanya, bratanya, hayva maṅan bavi, pha, tan katampǝkan gәriṅ aguṅ.
śaśih, 4, taṅ, piṅ, 15, saṅ hyaṅ asmara devatanya, bratanya, hayva maṅan sarvaroṇḍon, pha, dadi siṅ tinandur.
śaśih, 5, paṅloṅ, piṅ, 15, saṅ hyaṅ mahādeva devatanya, bratanya, hayva sǝhǝk yan aṅūcap, hayva nǝmbaṅnǝṅbaṅ boñcah, pha, drәman avǝvәka.
śaśih, 6, taṅ, piṅ, 8, saṅ hyaṅ atanu devatanya, bratanya, hayva aṅinǝp, riṅ paluluṅhān, pha, sugih tan kelaṅ elaṅan.
śaśih, 7, taṅ, piṅ, 13, saṅ hyaṅ manasija devatanya, bratanya, aṅrakā, pha, sugih keḍәp kapaṅgih siṅ giṇa harṣa.
śaśih, 8, taṅ, piṅ, 2, saṅ hyaṅ anaṅgara devatanya, bratanya, hayva amaṅan paṭik vǝnaṅ suku pat, pha, sugih patik vǝnaṅ.
śaśih, 9, taṅ, piṅ, 6, saṅ hyaṅ ravi devatanya, bratanya, hayva maṅan asu, pha, apәkik raspati prajurit.
śaśih, 10, taṅ, piṅ, 4, saṅ hyaṅ brahmā devatanya, bratanya, hayva maṅanan dǝlәṅ riṅ luhur, pha, kinasihaniṅ hyaṅ, mvaṅ voṅ mule akvehakeh asih iri kita.
śaśih, jyeṣṭa, taṅ, piṅ, 5, saṅ hyaṅ leka jaya devatanya, bratanya, aṅlampar ananapu, pha, keḍәp mandi sakәcapta.
śaśih, saddhā, taṅ, piṅ, 1, saṅ hyaṅ pisodharī devatanya, bratanya, hayva turu lavan istri, pha, keḍәp aomah omah.
Iyā ṅitaṅ kariṅ vulan, kr̥ta masa haranya, den asthiti sira, keṅәtakәna hayvayva lupa.

div.ab: hana brata, saninigraha, ṅa, tan mamati aghni ri kālaniṅ tumpǝk kalivon, kramanya ta amujamumuja, ananapuh eṅ saṅgar, tāmvita nǝmbaha ri bhaṭāra śīvāditya, lviriṅ caru riṅ saṅgar, anapunar, arih, rәmbaṅ, tambo lagu akah araka, phala, kambaṅ vaṅi, burat vaṅi, lәṅa vaṅi, sәḍǝṅan ikṣu, dīpa, dhūpa, den asaṅkǝp, devadarv inasab, vīja, dhūpa, ika kahatur i bhaṭāra, ma, Om̐ namo bhagavatye vaśūdevāya, sarvatuṣṭan, dadāsime, Om̐ śrī gurubhyo namaḥ, devacarundādasi mahātrәpti svāhā.

tәlas taṅ avaṅiha ta kita, ma, Om̐ sūrya putrāya namaḥ. samaṅkana taṅ brata lәkasakәna, hayva ta pramada riṅ brata, kunaṅ yan kālaṅan agriṅ, sakalviraniṅ aṅalaṅana, pinakavuruṅaniṅ brata, hayva pinakṣakǝn ikaṅ brata, kaliṅanya mvitana juga muvah, kunaṅ yan tan kalaṅana, anulus rahayu, pakṣakәna ika, pha, riṅ dlāhanta dadi ratu sukha vāhya katәmu, pinakāśraya deniṅ padhanta ratu, keḍәp kapintuhu deniṅ rat kabeh.

iti sanibrata, kayatnakәna de saṅ amet hayu, ndan ika hayva malәtuh ikaṅ ambǝk, mataṅyan ika hayva mithyamiṣya buddhi, tātkalanta maṅanakǝn brata, apan yan tan karakṣa ikaṅ brata denta, maṅdadyakǝn vighnaniṅ śarīra, yan enak denta rumakṣa sarīra, makajñāna buddhi mahottama, malilaṅa ahniṅ nirāvaraṇa, tan pagәlәh gәlәh, tan karakәtan karṇa śūla, mvaṅ rajah tamah, ika ta maṅdadyakǝn svarga magәṅ, ṅuniveh jñāna viśeṣa, vruha ri kramanira sovaṅ sovaṅ.

hana brata sabran manis, ṅa, tan pamaṅan tampakiṅ apuy, rvaṅ vulan samayanya, sabran pahiṅ tan pamaṅan tampakiṅ aghni, rvaṅ vulan samayanya, sabran pon tan padus tan palәṅa, tan pararavup, tan pakәkәmuh, rvaṅ vulan samayanya, sabran vage, tan paturu gumuliṅ, rvaṅ vulan samayanya, sabran kalivon, tan paṅūcap ucap, rvaṅ vulan samayanya, pha, ginañjar deniṅ vatǝk devata kabeh, norana nūkr̥tani, tan hilaṅ takonakәna, drәventa tǝmbe.
nihan haji pabrata, yaniṅ taṅgal piṅ lima, anuju kalivon, paṅupavāśa,
div.p: esuknya riṅ manis, amaṅan kupat pāṇḍava, 5, ivaknya kacaṅ, pha, dukiṅ alit duruṅ anәmu, yan vus agәṅ amaṅgih sukha sugih aguṅ dunya.
pa, amaṅan kupat syaṅ anti, 9, ivaknya komak, pha, tinuṅgu deniṅ rāma reṇa, aṅantos aputu abuyut, kinadhama deniṅ bapebu, kaptini hulun.
pva, amaṅan kupat sidayu, 7, ivaknya sudhaṅ, pha, aṅapti listvayu, alit arampiṅ aṅlәlǝnte, tan amadhani, sukha sugih drәman baṅkit, pinarәkan pinakapahulunaniṅ maru.
va, amaṅan kupat sih tan pәgat, 4, ivaknya taluh, pha, aṅapti sukha sugih, drәman siddhi baṅkit, keḍәpiṅ alaki, tan kavaśa lakinta aṅluṅani, pinūji deniṅ matva, tanana ṅesǝm.

ka, andha kupat gәnǝp, 8, ivaknya raraśmen, pha, aṅapti sukha sugih aguṅ vīrya, añjǝnǝṅ arddha nareśvarī, keḍәp aṅūcap. esuk riṅ manis, handha kupat siddha luṅguh, 10, ivaknya dagiṅ loh, sāgara dhanu, alas savah, dagiṅ pomahan, phalanya, aṅapti sukha sugih aguṅ vīrya, kinajrihan deniṅ śatru, kinadama deniṅ bala mvaṅ varga, pinarәkan deniṅ bala sabran, tan ivaṅ deniṅ bala, sami vatra tan anaṅsal, siddhi maṇḍi tan paṅucap, rәmrәm ikaṅ vvaṅ kabeh, riṅ panaṅkilan, tinaṅkiliṅ bala sakiṅ doh, abahan təka sakiṅ tan hana, sabran sabran, yan vadon sinivi deniṅ maru, tan hana maḍani, sadera ṅrehakәna, vr̥ddhi putra, kinajrihan deniṅ santana, vīrya bhukti, embah mañabuh, imbuh imbuh tan paṅloṅ. sami danur daha.

div.ab:
hana brata nuṅku rāt, ṅa, kalivonka andumahamaduma. umanismanisU, amadhuāhāramadhuhara, pahiṅpva, ambhayuāhāraabhayuharaambhayuhara, pvanpva, atoyāhāraatoyahara, vageva, aghniāhāraaghnihāra, pūrṇama, tīlәm, amatiāhāraamatihāra, piṅrvanaka, ṅapiṅ rvana kabehpiṅ rva nika, phaakabeh phalanyaika ta kabeh, pha,, amupusi brata kabehamupiṅ brata kabehamuvusi brata kabeh.
hana bratta nuṅku ... bratta kabeh
in III.56 in III.179 in III.64

hana brata, mañcavāramañcavara, ṅa, umanismanis amaṅanumaṅan sәga putih, pahiṅ amaṅan kәtanlakәtan baṅ, ponpvan amaṅan sәga kuniṅ, vage amaṅan kәtan irәṅ, kalivon amaṅan kәtan amañca varṇa. vetan amaṅan antǝlu putihnyasәga putih mvah antәlu putihnya, kidul sura, kulon antǝlu kuniṅkuniṅnya, lor bakakulbakatul, riṅ tәṅah śarasi baṅ hatiatih, pha, sukha sugih.
hana bratā, mañcadara ... suka sugih
in III.180 in III.80

hana brata, anūt saptavāra, ṅa, ra, asisirih, 5, ra. ca, asisirih, 4, ca. a, asisirih, 3, a. bu, asisirih, 7, bu. vrә, asisirih, 8, vrә. śu, asisirih, 6, śu. śa, asisirih, 9, śa. pha, sukha sugih, vәnaṅ sakama kama.

hana brata, amaṅan sәkul aṅgi sarahup, sinaṅga ri taṅan kiva, tan patәḍa tan patambǝh, tigaṅ vәṅi samayanya, saṅ hyaṅ siddhi rakṣa sira turun abrata, uṅgvanira riṅ rāt, pha, tәḍunaniṅ drәman agave hayu, tan kapәjahan vәka kita, tәrus tumus tәkeṅ vәka vet bet.

hana brata, maṅan sәkul saravup, sinaṅga ri taṅan kiva, tan patәḍa tan patambǝh, lalab kevala, 3, vәṅi lavasnya, kārya hana putra, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ sandi rasa sira turun abrata, uṅgvanira riṅ śarīra, riṅ rahasya, kәdhukaniṅ duman agave hayu, kveh putra kveh vvaṅ vәlas asih iri kita.
hana brata, amaṅan sinaṅga ri taṅan kiva, saivaknya, sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, pakṣa hiḍǝp, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ kuvera hyaṅnya, ya pinakarūpa, pinakakulit, pinakaalis, pha, siddhiniṅ vvaṅ abәcik i pambǝkan.
hana brata, amaṅan sәkul, pituṅ lek divasanyā, pha, akveh mahyun iri kita, hanvā ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana brata, maṅan sәga kevala, sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, hyaṅ puravat sira turun abrata, pha, sucāra vruh ri kaliṅanya.

hana brata, amaṅanmaṅan sәga putih, riṅyan taṅgal apisan, saṅ hyaṅ prasiddha turun abrata, satahun samayanyalavasanya, pha, kinasihaniṅkinasihan deniṅ rāt, aṅliraṅ ṅaraniṅ brataamәliran haraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana bratā, hamaṅan ... brata maṅkana
in III.187 in III.61 quite similiar. here is the text: hana brata hamaṅan sәkul putih, yan taṅgal, 1, haliraṅ haraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ prasiddha turun habratā, satavun ṣamayanya, phalanya kinasihan deniṅ rāt in III.134
hana brata, amaṅan sәga balaka, sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ paravan hyaṅnya, pha, vruhiṅ ācarā kaliṅanya.

hana brata, maṅanamaṅan sәga putih, 5, puluṅ, kәtantәkan baṅ, 5, kәtansәgar jәnar, 5, tridhātusidhātu brata, 5, mañcavāra, saṅ hyaṅ padma rasa tumurun abratabrata, pinakasoca, bayu śabda iḍǝp, sugih tan hina saambǝk phalanya.
hana bratā, maṅan ... sāhambǝk phalanya
in III.189 in III.79
hana brata, añәkulañaṅkul aṅgi, ulam pahi, lamanyalama satәṅahtәṅah lek, ranini paduka bhaṭārī uma hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, avavanonwawanonvavadon vastusvasta, kinarmakәniṅ akvehakeh.

app.note:
hana bratā, hañkul ... kinarmmakniṅ hakeh
in III.190 in III.102

div.ab: hana brata, amaṅan sәkul aṅgi, anaṅgap, 7, pūr, sira saṅ hyaṅ viśeṣa tumurun abrata, pha, ginañjaran śakti lima, vadon viṣṇu anәmu, tan alavasahalavas tur prajñan, vicakṣaṇa, sukha sugih riṅ dlāha.

hana brata, amaṅan sәkul pañcavarṇa, aren tiniṅkah cakra tinañcǝban vr̥ti, denta maṅan maṅkana tatkāla kalivon, añakra bhuvana, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ śivātma sira turun abrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakayuṣa, pinakalaku, dadi vvaṅ aṅuripi jagat, sukha sugih vәnaṅ pinakasāriniṅ jagat, riṅ niṣkala.
hana brata jaga varṇa, ṅa, amaṅan sәkul, balañan , pituṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, keḍәp deniṅ rāt, prajñan vicakṣaṇa, bisāgamǝl aṅiduṅ, vīryavan.
hana brata, yan amaṅan anǝmbah sәkul, pituṅ rātri divasanya, pha, kinasihaniṅ hyaṅ, śrī cittamaṇi ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana brata naṅga sәkul, tinumpaṅan vr̥tti, yan pәjah ikaṅ vr̥ti, pavusan kita pamaṅan, pituṅ vәṅi lavasanya, salviriṅ sañjata tan tame kita, aṅañcaṅ ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana brata, yan amaṅan tinañcǝban vr̥ti , vulan, saṅ hyaṅ anuṅkǝbi jagat hyaṅnya, ya minakarūpā hayu apәkik, pha riṅ dadi vvaṅ sukha sugih, vәnaṅ amatūt jagat riṅ niṣkala.

hana brata, amaṅan tinañcǝban tuṅgul, tiniṅkah bhīma, hyaṅ maṇik teja, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ paṅirut jagat turuna abrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakalaku, pinakateja, phaaśrī iṅiriṅ sañjata, sakṣat kǝmbaṅ tinuṅgulan, śakti aṅrәbahakǝn jagat riṅ niṣkala.
hana brata, avr̥ti, ṅa, yan amaṅan tinañcǝban vr̥ti, pәjah taṅ vr̥ti, avusan amaṅan, saptarātri divasanya, pha, sarvarogha tan tumameṅ śarīranta.
hana brata, aṅǝmbaṅ, ṅa, lamun amaṅan kǝmbaṅ rumuhun, tigaṅ tahun tigaṅ lek divasanya, bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṅnya, pha, deva sih iri kita.

hana brata, ṅǝmbaṅ, ṅa, tan luṅhā yan kaparan tamutatamu, bhaṭāra viśeṣa maveh brata, pha, sugih tan ilaṅ takonakәna, amaṅgihmaṅgәh iṅ deśa norana voṅ siddhi gave.
hana bratā, ṅǝmbhaṅ ... sidḍi gave
in III.201 in III.88

hana brata aja tukar, ṅa, amaṅan asaṇdiṅ pulava kǝmbaṅ, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra guru maveh brata, pha, akarma alaki anom, tur kinasihaniṅ paṇḍita.
hana brata hajātukar ... kinasihaniṅ pāṇḍita
in III.202 in III.89
hana brata, maṅan kǝmbaṅ naṅkǝṅ umanismanis, hyaṅ maṇisumila haraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ asmara hyaṅnya, ya pinakarūpa, aśrī sumilah, pasamuhaniṅ akvehakeh riṅ niṣkala.

hana brata, yan amaṅan, tinumpaṅan kǝmbaṅ campaka, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik puḍak haraniṅ brata, hyaṅ vidakā turun abrata, ya minakarūpa, apәkik anulus, pha umitis iṅ menak, ring dadi vvaṅ, sukha sugih, vicakṣaṇa riṅ niṣkala.

hana brata, maṅan lalab luṅluṅan, mvaṅ kinǝmbaṅakǝn, 2, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik arṣana hyaṅnya, bhaṭāra bāyu sira turun abrata, ya pinakarūpaminakarūpa, pinakaurip ,, pinakarambut, pinakalǝye, pinaka iḍǝp, pinakagulu, pinakasindhuva, pinakalimbeyan, pha,riṅ dadi vvaṅ, sukha sugih, ambǝk ahәniṅ, akǝmbaṅ avohavәh riṅ niṣkala.

hana brata, amaṅan lalab balaka, sambǝl sinamohva, mantra pātāla, ṅa, hyaṅ basuki turun abrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakālit, pinakadalamakaniṅ suku, pinakatahulan, pinakakәliṅ, pha,riṅ dadi vvaṅ, sukha sugih, lәmah sīma, kinapeṅin deniṅ voṅ riṅ niṣkala.

hana brata, yan amaṅan tinumpaṅan vīja, saṅ hyaṅ vīra kusuma, ṅa, hyaṅ jayaniṅ rāt turun abrata, ya pinakarūpaminakarūpa, pinakajәnǝṅ, pinakapamulu, śakti aheṅ rūpanta, pha, riṅ dadi vvaṅ, sukha sugih, rāja drәve, mās pirak, putra putri riṅ niṣkala.

hana brata, yan amaṅan tinumpaṅan sәkar vaṅi vaṅi, saṅ hyaṅ mūrva gaṇḍa vaṅi haraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik sumirit hyaṅniṅ brata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakakulit, pinakahambu, pha, riṅ dadi vvaṅ, mrәbuk arūm, anǝrus tәkeṅ kaḍaton riṅ niṣkala.

hana brata, yan amaṅan sәkar śrigaḍiṅ, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik śrī danti hyaṅniṅ brata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakagugusi, pinakahuntu, pha, aśrī sakeṅ huntunta, sukha sugih, saṅ hyaṅ vidayaka sira turun abrata, pinakarūpa, apәkik anulus, tumitisiṅ menak, prakavi vicakṣaṇa riṅ niṣkala.
hana brata, yan amaṅan alamak sukǝt, puṣpani smr̥ti, ṅa, bhaṭāra smara hyaṅnya, ya pinakālas, pha,nәhәr kinasihaniṅ bape bu.
hana brata, amaṅan alamak patra, amūrti prāṇa, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ pagər gunuṅ sira turun abrata, ya pinakahuntu, pha, dīrgha yuṣa, pәjah tan pahavan kadga.

hana brata, amaṅan aren roṇḍon, pituṅ vulan pituṅ vәṅi divasanya, bhaṭāra mahīśvara hyaṅnya, pha, mulih mariṅ bhaṭāra mahiśvara, sasvarga sira, sasarnya majanma riṅ juru bhāṣa, labdhavāra ri saṅ ahulun.
hana brata, amaṅan aren upih, pinuluṅ kuyupakәna, pha, sugih dodot, mvaṅ siñjaṅ.
hana brata, amaṅanaren pampat, kvehnya, 73, aṇḍaniṅ janur, iṅaṅge, pha, sukha sugih, apәkik alus avakta, jarijinta lәmǝs.

hana brata, sarvaghaṭa, ṅa, yan amaṅan tan pahupa, pataṅ lek pataṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, prajñan vicakṣaṇa, bisa gamәl aṅiduṅ, vāk bajra siddhi mantra, jayeṅ śatru keḍәp deniṅ rāt, sukha sugih saṅkan rare.

hana brata, asiṅ ṅaranya, pisan amaṅan kinaṅ, yan amaṅan sumәlap aṅinaṅ, nәhәr tan pahupa, salek lavasnya, bhaṭārī uma hyaṅniṅ brata, ma, Om̐ yanā Devî nama svāhā, ahes, pha, sukha sugih amǝpǝki kaḍaton.

hana brata, tan paṅinaṅ, añǝmbuṅanәmbaṅ kevala, salek samayanyasaulan, saṅ hyaṅ kāma jayamajaya hyaṅniṅhyaniṅ brata, pha, abhrāabhru sumilahdumilah miyat kabeh, keḍǝp paṅūcapta deniṅ rāt·
hana bratā, tan ... deniṅ rāt
in III.218 in III.77
hana brata, saṅga ṅinaṅ, ṅa, satahun salek lavasnya, pha, drәman malaky arabi, ratu asih, ahes, ma, Om̐ braśri vastuya nama svāhā.

hana brata, asihaniṅ layon, ṅa, aṅinaṅ tan pambuñcal sәpah, tigaṅ tahun samayanya, sahiṅ sәpah kinampelakǝn, bhinasmi, iki pituturnya, ma, Om̐ bhaṭāra mati, ahurip mani amor iṅ megha, tumitis dadi sarvaendahsarvendah, pinakabhuktiniṅ hulun, sa ba ta a i namā śivāya.
hana bratā, hasihaniṅ ... namā śiva ya
in III.219 in III.112

hana brata, adahaṛ pucaṅ satәṅahtәṅah vәlas, vulamaniṅ pahi, ra Nini paduka bhaṭārī anuṅku rāt hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, abәcik kaṅ jariji.
hana bratā, hadahaṛ ... habcikaṅ jariji
in III.220 in III.100

hana brata, yan amaṅan asaṇḍiṅ dhūpa damar, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik teja, ṅa, hyaṅ maṇik muntab sira turun abrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakateja, śakti mahabhāra, phariṅ dadi vvaṅ, abhrā murub sumilah, aheṅ jәrih kaṅ rāt denta.
hana brata, aḍahar pucaṅ tәṅah vәlah, vulamaniṅ pahi, ra Nini paduka bhaṭārī anuṅku rāt hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, abәcik kaṅ jariji.

hana brata, damarmar aguṅ ṅaranya, tan pamaṅan kasurupan saṅ hyaṅ sūrya, savarṣa lamanyasәṅkәrnya, kaṅ pinaṅanpinaṅanya, yuyukanyuyuk, bavaṅ uṅkul, tarasi, sasivi, raraka malo, caṅkuk sarvan vinuṅkul, prut amuradaṅanamūradaṇan, pha, kacakṣu riṅ sarvarusitsarvarusik, luputiṅ sarvaśāstra, tan maṅhel vinuruknyavinurukta, tumusiṅ aji, aṅlariṅtaṅlariṅ kevuh, bhaṭāra śiva hyaṅniṅhyaṅnira hyaṅniṅ brata.
hana bratā, damar ... hyaṅniṅ bratta
in III.222 in III.120
hana brata, pasaṅ saṇḍe, ṅa, tan pamaṅan kasurupan saṅeṅe, pha, apaḍaṅ kaṅ hati, yan asisinahu eṅgal bisa.

hana brata, tan pamaṅanpaṅan riṅ pūrṇamaniṅ kadaśa, antuk tigaṅ pūrṅamaniṅ kadaśa, pha, svarga sakala katәmu,katәmu sakala mañjanma riṅ ratu, paripūrṇānurāga riṅ rāt.
hanā bratā, tan ... riṅ rāt
in III.224 in III.99

hana brata, mūrṅamaamūrṇama sadā, ṅa, pūrṇama tan pamaṅanpaṅan tәkaniṅ paṅloṅ apisan,apisan tilǝm tәkaniṅ taṅgal apisan, phaphalanya, sugih manәrussugih manәrus, katәkantәkana, sapinakṣanirapinakṣanira riṅ bhūmiriṅ bhūmi, saṅ prajuritiṅ bhūmisaṅ prajuritiṅ bhūmi hyaṅniṅ bratahyaṅnya hyaṅniṅ.
hana brata, mūṛṅnama ... hyaṅniṅ brata
in III.225 in III.107
hana brata akasukhan, ṅa, riṅ pūrṇamaniṅ kapitu, piṅ, 7, sarahina, piṅ, 7, savәṅi, amaṅan aṅinum, aṅigǝl, bhaṭāra kapitu maveh brata, pha, sukha sugih, anak amitra, dīrgha yuṣa, keḍәp kapintuhu.
hana brata, mәnǝr ri taṅgal, piṅ, 3, maṅan kuñit, mūrṇama sadā, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ trisandhi hyaṅniṅ brata, papalihan bhaṭāra mahādeva, ya pinakarūpa, pinakapamulu, mvaṅ kavicakṣaṇan, pha, tan kaluputan.
taṅgal, piṅ, 4, amaṅan kәtan irәṅ, amukti labdha, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ cadu śakti hyaṅniṅ brata, papalihan bhaṭāra viṣṇu, ya pinakarūpa, pinakarambut, pha, siddhaniṅ ṅvaṅ, anvargakǝn bapebu.
taṅ, piṅ, 5, amañcavāra śakti, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ pañcavāra hyaṅniṅ brata, papalihan bhaṭāra śiva, ya pinakarūpa, pinaka iḍǝp, pinakatǝṇḍas pha, siddhaniṅ ṅvaṅ sugih tan kaharṣa.

hana brata maṅanamaṅan raka, pūrṇama tilәmlima ṅraka, sira saṅ hyaṅ patūtpatūtan sih tumurun abrata, pha, ginañjaran śakti lima, pinakalalakonpinakārama, pinaka lalalon sukha sugih tan panambut kārya.
hana bratā maṅān ... panambut kaṛyya
in III.228 in III.110
hana brata, mūrṇama tilәm, ṅa, maṅupavāsa,aṅraka kunǝṅ, pha, utaṅiṅ atvanta, kәna sinahur polihnya sakarәpta.
hana brata, ṅraka naṅkǝn kalivon, patra, ṅa, hyaṅ taruṇa turun abrata, ya pinakarūpa, pha, siddhaniṅ vaṅ sugih lәmah sīma.
hana brata, maṅan sarvaphala, talǝs huvi vahvahan pisaṅ kunaṅ, pituṅ vәṅi lavasnya, kasubhagan kinaharṣan deniṅ strīistri phalanya, abhoh kayu ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
hana brata, maṅan phala gantuṅ, davun sinabraṅ, ṅa, pha, prajurit.
hana brata, maṅan sarvabuṅkah, sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ viśeṣa hyaṅniṅ brata, sukha sugih, puṣṭaka lǝṅǝn phalanya.
hana brata, amaṅan sarvaphala, saptarātri lavasnya, pha, kinasihaniṅ strī, yaniṅ strī kinasihaniṅ kakuṅ.

hana brata, amaṅan tur ambaṅkit, bhaṭārī keḍәp hyaṅniṅ brata, ṅgonaniṅ amimiti, riṅ pavon, punaṅ kininaṅ sәḍah sapon den tuvuh, lalamak lampuyaṅ, tan pamaṅan tan paṅinaṅ, yan tan paṅgugut lampuyaṅ, pha, vavadon tan pagigilutan, keḍәp malaki.
hana brata, amaṅan katambat tigaṅ bulih, naṅkǝn kalivon, tan pamaṅan paran paran, pituṅ kalivon samayanya, pha, apәkik tur lǝmǝsiṅ rambut.
hana brata, ambhūmi lәpa, ṅa, amaṅan jaṅaniṅ lǝlǝpa kabeh, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra Iśvara maveh brata, pha, kinasihaniṅ svami, keḍәp alaki, kinasihaniṅ hyaṅ.
hana brata, amaṅana mimba, salek lavasnya, pha, athāravit.

hana brata, sarvatatā, ṅa, amaṅan luṅggahiṅ gaṇḍagada rusa kәliṅ, mvaṅ campaka garus, bhaṭāra śambhu hyaṅnya, pha, mulih , riṅ svargasvargan bhaṭāra guru, mvaṅ riṅ bhaṭāra śiva.
hana brata, sāṛvva ... bhaṭāra śiva
in III.239 in III.80

hana brata, vījāharāmiśahara, ṅa, amaṅan vījasarvavīja rumuhun, saha pucukiṅ gaṇḍa rusarusa kәliṅ, pucukiṅ alaṅ-alaṅalalaṅ, pha, prajñanprajñanaprāṇa kita, sihaniṅkinasihaniṅkinasihan deniṅ istrī.
hana brata, vijāharā ... sihaniṅ strīistri
in III.33 in III.240 in III.15 in III.33
hana brata, maṅan sarvaluṅgah luṅgahan, pucukiṅ dukut lәpas, pucukiṅ alaṅ-alaṅ, tuñjuṅ, vīja tәluṅ jumput, saptarātri pituṅ dina lavasanya, siddha kārya saphalanya, amūrva ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.

hana brata ṅantavali, ṅa, amaṅan antavali, pañjaṅnya salǝṅkat madhya, pituṅ tumpǝk kalivon patәlasanya, mirica pituṅ viji, ligundi pituṅ muñcuk, pha, salara vighna hilaṅ donya, sojarira keḍәp,
katәmu maṅke mvaṅ dlāha.
hana brata nirambu, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sarvabinumbon, satahun lavasnya, pha, mulih mariṅ svarga bhaṭāra rūdra, sasarnya majanma ri listvayu, apәkik prajurit.
hana brata, amaṅan kәtan baṅ, pituṅ vәṅi, hirәṅ pituṅ vәṅi, ivaknya sarvaśuci, arariṅ śakti, ṅa, bhagavān paraśara hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, akadaṅ voṅ pәkik.

hana brata, maṅanamaṅan kәtanlikәtan ya ya taǝp, voṅ tuṅgal tuṅgal riṅ kalivon, 7, hǝmbanya phala, sahaṅ, mәñanmәñan, sahaṅ, aṅgara kash amaṅan, 7, alaṇḍyan, sira saṅ hyaṅ asihiṅ prāṇa turunsira turun abrata, ginañjaran śakti lima, pha, sukha sugih, sapatinya vәnaṅ.
hana bratā, maṅan ... sapatinya vnaṅ
in III.245 in III.108
hana brata, anila, ṅa, amaṅan kәtan hirәṅ, satahun samayanya, pha, mantuk iṅ svarga bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasarnya majanma riṅ mantrī.
hana brata, murāṇa, ṅa, amaṅan ñahñah lan gula tәbu, lamanya tigaṅ dina, pha, tan kataman siṅ saparanta.
Hana brata, maṅan tan dady akarvan, pituṅ lek lavasnya, suka magәṅ phalanya, ekapatra ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.

hana brata, tan kapadan, ṅa, yan amaṅan tan pakǝmbulan, aduluran pañcamuna, sahuripnya riṅ amaṅan, alalab roṇḍon, mvaṅ kǝmbaṅ, uttamaniṅ brata kabeh, pha, tan kapadan viśeṣa, maṅkana polahira saṅ viku tәmǝn tәmǝn.

hana brata, amaṅan tan pakǝmbulankramanya tan vәnaṅ akәmbulan amaṅantan kavasa amaṅan akәmbulan, pәtaṅ tahunvarṣa samayanya, pha, mantuk riṅ svargasvargan bhaṭāra rudra, sasarnya mañjanmajanma riṅ kulaputravikulaputra, kaḍaṅakaḍaṝ haji subhaganuraga.

app.note:
hana brata, hamaṅan ... hajī subhagā
in III.79 in III.250 in III.95

div.ab:
hana brata, aṅajum , ṅa, amaṅan riṅ vaton salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra mahādeva maveh brata, pha, tәka atuduhiṅ paliṅgihan, keḍәp tәka ruruṅeniṅ voṅ.
hana brata, haṅaju ... ruruṅeniṅ voṅ
in III.251 in III.83

hana brata, amutәriṅ paṅkon, ṅa, amaṅanamaṅun pinaṅku, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra mahādeva maveh brata, pha, kinasihan deniṅ bapa ibu, malaky arabisatya rabi, sasarnya dadi bhujaṅga lәvih.
hana bratā, hamutriṅ ... bhujaṅga l̥vih
in III.252 in III.84
hana brata, amaṅan ry aghūrṇita, pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, siddhi mantra, listvayu paripūrṇa.

hana brata, naṅkənāratan aṅkәn nara, ṅa, yan amaṅan aṅagǝm jinahjina, 7pituṅ, leksalek samayanya, saṅ hyaṅ rudra hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, akәlar tantane kәneṅ griṅśrī kita.
hana brata, naṅkə̄nāra ... griṅ kitā
in III.254 in III.78

hana brata, asaṇḍiṅ jinah keteṅsaketeṅ, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra indra maveh brata, pha, prajñaprajñan prakavi, aṣṭa kośala, sasarnya dadi patih sugih.
hana brata, hasaṇḍiṅ ... patih sugih
in III.255 in III.90

hana brata, maṅanamaṅan aṅadut, satahun lavasnya, pha, sugih siddhi mandi, avakvākmahavak bajra subhaga.
hana brata, maṅan ... bhajrā subhagā
in III.88 in III.256 in III.122

hana brata, amaṅan kupat pāṇḍava, 3, paṅanǝnpaṅanәnәn esukaesuk, 1, paṅanǝn tәṅah ṅvetaṅaṅetәṅaṅe, 1, paṅanǝn sore, 1, pha, rinakṣa deniṅ rāt, kinasavitan deniṅ sama janma, haja nali vavaktayanya, tan pamuruṅ polihnyaolihnya. pamurup hana brata, hamaṅan ... pamuruṅ polihnya
in III.257 in III.72
hana brata, maṅan kupat, mevaka sarvaśukla, tәluṅ vәṅi divasanya, bhaṭāra iśvara hyaṅniṅ brata, pha,bisa ṅiduṅ, abәcikiṅ ulon, manisiṅ panutukan, mvaṅ kinasihaniṅ voṅ.
hana brata, aḍahar lәpǝt, lama tәṅah vulan, ra Nini kuṇḍaṅ kasih hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, arampiṅ.

hana brata, naḍah tumpəṅ, sahasta pañjaṅnya, śūnya ivaknya uyah harәṅ kevala, anarasvatī, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ pitu tan palavan hyaṅniṅ brata, ya pinakaprajña, sih malaky arabi, siddhaniṅ vaṅ sugih tan surud, mvaṅ pradaṇānuṅku rāt.
hana brata, maṅan tumpəṅ, lavasnya tәṅah śaśih, lamun tan kavaśa, pituṅ dina, ra Nini paduka bhaṭārī hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, abәcik kaṅ gulu.

hana brata, advaaṅadoadәṅo savәguṅ, bhaṭāra rudra maveh brata, pha, sugih rumbe.
hana bratā, haṅado ... sugih rumbe
in III.262 in III.91

hana brata, asiḍakǝp sarahina, bhaṭāra śaṅkara maveh brata, pha kinasihaniṅ voṅ.
hana brata, hasidakǝp ... kinasihaniṅ voṅ
in III.263 in III.144 in III.92

hana brata, lumaku savәṅi sarahina, bhaṭāra guru maveh brata, pha, sasarnya dadi deva gurudadi deva gurusasarnya dadi devaga guru, bahu śiṣyasasarnya dadi viku bahuśiṣya, apәkik rūpa, sutejateja tiniṅhalan, sugih saṅkan rare, sugih tәrustusvus tumus.
hana bratā, lumaku ... tus tumus
in III.264 in III.145 in III.93

hana brata, amәlәṅ tutuk sarahina savәṅivәṅi, marәp pūrvapūr, saṅ hyaṅ anәmu jagat sira turun abrata, pha, ginañjaran śakti lima, pinakarāmapinakarapi, pinakalalakon vadonvaṅ vadon, lituhyulistvayulistuhayu, prajñan, lanaṅ vicakṣaṇa, sukha sugih, maṅkemaṅke kaṅ kalavan tǝmbe.
hana brata, hamlə̄ṅ ... kalavan tǝmbe
in III.265 in III.148 in III.107

hana brata ṅālamuñəṅ, ṅapūr, saṅ hyaṅ lәbur jagat sira turun abrata, ginañjaran śakti lima, voṅ tuṅgal sakvehiṅ sira abrata, ya pinakarūpayan pinakapūpa, pinakalakonpinakalalakon, vastu rahayu, lanaṅ vadon sukha sugih drәman keḍәp.
hana bratā ṅalamuñə̄ṅ ... dr̥mman keḍǝp
in III.266 in III.113
hana brata, ṅālacakra, ṅa, sira saṅ hyaṅ viśeṣa riṅ bhuvana, sira turun abrata, ginañjaran śakti tigaṅ rakṣa, sakvehaniṅ abrata, pha, sukha sugih, prajñan vicakṣaṇa, lanaṅ vadon.

hana brata, mañcavaśa giṇa, ṅa, tan paṅlavaniṅ vadon aṅucap, naṅkǝn umanis, yan vadon tan paṅucapiṅ kakuṅ, tan paṅinaṅ suruhiṅ apvan, lǝlǝmbaran vәnaṅ, pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, tinūtiṅ mās, salviriṅ drәventa tǝmbe.

hanahana brata, kukusaniṅ śarīra, ṅa, tan pamaṅan suku pat, lavasnya sakavaśaniṅsakavaśahaniṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ caduśakticanduśakti sira turun abrata, ya pinakarūpaminakarūpā, pinakavaṅkoṅ, siddhaniṅ vvaṅ muṣṭika, akveh avәlas, rovaṅ asih iri kitarovaṅ akeh avәlas riṅ sira, aṅraṅkusaṅraṅkul aṅraṅkus brata.
hana bratā, kukuśaniṅ ... haṅraṅkus bratā
in III.269 in III.74

hana brata, tan pamaṅan bavi, hyaṅ manasija hyaṅnya, pituṅ tavun samayanyalavasnya, pha, luputiṅ gәriṅ aguṅ, tur kinasihan deniṅ jagat.
hana brata, tan ... deniṅ jagat
in III.270 in III.103

hana brata, tan pamaṅan śr̥gāla, pha, rūpanta tan akusut.
hana bratā, tan ... tan akusut
in III.271 in III.104
hana brata, tan pamaṅan ayam, pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, tan pamaṅgih mari.

hana brata, tan pamaṅan ayamivak ayam, satahun samayanyalavasnya, pha, tan panәmu maru, tur drәman.
hana bratā, tan ... tūṛ dr̥maman
in III.273 in III.137
hana brata, akәrisa, ṅa, tan pamaṅan yan tan pasisig rumuhun, sari sari, bhaṭārī śvari hyaṅniṅ brata, satahun sayamanya, pha, prajña, tavitan labdha mās kita.

hana brata ñaṇḍiṅ ḍaḍap, lama tigaṅ dinatigaṅ dina lavasnya, tan pamaṅan,pamaṅan, vәkasanya maṅkana, bhaṭāra śiva hyaṅnyahyaṅniṅ brata, pha, svarga lәvih dinuṅkapnya, subhaga kita, kulaputra, atәhǝr viśeṣa, bahudaṇḍabahudhǝṇdhabavudaṇdha ñakravr̥ttiñakravarti.
hana brata ñandiṅ ... bahuḍǝṇḍa ñakrāvr̥tti
in III.275 in III.114

hana brata, ṅapitu, ṅa, naṅkǝn dvadaśi śukla pakṣaniṅ kapitu, aṅupavāsa, bhaṭāra bhīma hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ bam̐ bhīmāya namaḥ, pamit, pha, viryavan kapintuhu deniṅ rāt, sugih mās pirak, hulun putra vr̥ddhi, siddha sakāryanta.

hana brata, ṅrәspatimaṅvr̥spati, ṅa, kramanya anaṅkǝn vrәspati ṅupavāsa,kramanya aṅupavāsa, manaṅkәn vr̥spati pha, listuhayu kita, siṅ kāryantakinārya hayu.
hana brattha, ṅr̥spati ... kāṛyyanta hayu
in III.277 in III.119
hana brata, tan pamaṅan pituṅ rātri, pha, vīryavan siddha sakāryanta.
hana brata, ṅupavāsa, sacandra samayanya, riṅ kasapuluh, pha, kapituhu deniṅ rāt, mās pirak tәka vr̥ddhi, kinasihan deniṅ paṇḍita.

hana brata, yan tәkaniṅ vәton, tanaja pamaṅanmaṅan sarvvāmbǝkansarvamambәkan, pha, antuka omah omah, tan surud dharmanya, bhaṭārahyaṅ rudra hyaṅnya.
hana bratā, yan ... rudra hyaṅnya
in III.280 in III.110, III.136
hana brata tan pamaṅan sarvvāmbǝkan, pva, ka, pha, keḍәp deniṅ rāt.
hana brata, amiraṅ, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sarvaprāṇa prāṇi, satahun tigaṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭārī pabyavara hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, siṅ prih meṅgal katәmu, deva sih iri kita.

hana brata, yan amaṅan asaṇḍiṅ puṣpa liṅga, aṅliga prāṇa, ṅaharaniṅ brata, hyaṅ aṅgaṣṭi sira turun abrata, pha, keḍәpiṅ rāt, tur rūpantarūpantu muntab, śaktiśakәti prajurit mahābharamahambara, yan dadi vvaṅ abhra murub, tan kasoran rūpanta, dīrgha yuṣa paripūrṇa, puruṣa viśeṣaviśeṣa.
hana bratā, yan ... puruṣā viśeṣā
in III.283 in III.25
hana brata, aṅliṅga pәraṅ, ṅa, yan amaṅan asaṇḍiṅ duhuṅ, bhaṭāra rudra hyaṅiṅ brata, pha, akveh vvaṅ tumaṅgalaṅ asih iri kita.
hana brata, aṅubi, ṅa, amaṅan aṅinum bañu rumuhun, huvusiṅ amaṅan, tan vәnaṅ aṅucap lavan voṅ, pha, akәlar, sukha sugih, tan kǝna griṅ, tan sasar kapintuhu deniṅ rāt.

hana brata, maṅan tan pembuh, tan paṅinum bañu, pha, śakti kiteṅ ri niṣkala, lavasnya sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ dura dasih hyaṅnya, tatkālaniṅ abrata, tan paturviṅ rahina, pha, apaḍaṅ riṅ rūpa, apaḍaṅ kaṅ hati, kinasihaniṅ rāt.

hana brata, ñәkul bañu, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sәga sadina, tan paturviṅ rahina vәṅi, aṅayapakǝn tәkeṅ polihnya, añjanma hayu, ma, rāga śūnya mahiśi taya, amaṅan sәga satatak, siniratiṅ toya añar, pamit, vus mapamit, maḍahar, sakantunanya, hayva mañapuhaṅ.

hana brata ñәkul bañu, mañjiṅ lima ṅaranya, kavaśa amaṅan suruh, maṅan sәkul inumi toya, sәga sakәpǝl tinatak ri lәpa lәpaniṅ taṅan, vәnaṅ inumi bañu sabran sore, lavasiṅ abrata, satahun, yan kavaśa, mokṣa salviriṅ lara, vighnaniṅ śarīra ilaṅ donya.

hana brata, tan paṅinum vvai, tatkāla savuku galuṅan, ṅhiṅ tāmaṅan hantiga pinǝṅḍǝm, harәpiṅ ḍәṅǝn, sambi aṅadǝg tәṅaṅ ṅve tatkāla guṅe, ardhaṇa bhaṭāra mr̥tyu, phalanya kәdhuk timbul, tutug tumuvuh, puruṣa viśeṣa, śakti vani, kineriṅan deniṅ jagat, labdhavāra gragaluṅan.
hana brata, aṅambaṅ, ṅa, yan amaṅan kinambaṅakәn riṅ bañu, satahun samayanya, bhaṭāra viṣṇu maveh brata, pha, mañjanma riṅ kaḍaṅ aji, sugih vәsi, tur keḍәp kavi prajurit.

[nyan ta saṅ citta varaṇā, umarah ri
saṅ vala kula, mūla tattvaniṅ dadi kabeh, pahenak paṅrәṅə̄nta, mūlabhoktaniṅ kanirāśrayan, mvaṅ kābhyudayan, bhāvanya mvaṅ lakṣaṇanya, pūrvanya mvaṅ vәkasnya, maṅkana liṅ saṅ vala kula, nǝmbah hulun, Om̐ viku satakvan tānaku, kita pva sikṣa ṅaran ika, duga-duga tumakvan, vuvus maṅkana, rәṅə̄n siptaniṅ hulun.
pūrvaṃ śrī puruṣānte, varānugraha makanya, saṅ rojyam, narāsakane, ayavaṃ vidyaṃ prajayaṃ.
maṅkana pariñciniṅ cipta, kaliṅanya, pūrva haraniṅ mimitan, tripuruṣa haraniṅ brahmā viṣṇu Iśvara, vara ṅaraniṅ amiddhi, anugraha haraniṅ panuṅsuṅ, manoka ṅaraniṅ devata, saroja ṅaraniṅ manūtra, nara ṅaraniṅ mānuṣa, sakāla ṅaraniṅ samaṅke, yaśa ṅaraniṅ kirti, vidyā ṅaraniṅ aji, aprayadha ṅaraniṅ pūjā,
kaliṅanya, bhaṭāra sira magave pratapa riṅ vana giri, maṅaṣkāra bhaṭāra, bhaṭārī, atitah kasukhan amragat trәṣṇā, anusupi vanavāsa, maṅǝnakǝn tapa, manaṅsāra rāga, tinūt deniṅ manūṣa maṅke, atapa abrata, ayoga asamadhī, ayajña dāna kīrti,
maṅhanakǝn brata apayapanya, ulandriya, rumәgǝp pañcendriya, tuṅgalakәna riṅ trisandhyā, piṇdhakǝn riṅ kaparāmarthan, vaḍahana yoga, sahabana samadhi, tindihana brata, tuṅgunǝniṅ dāna kīrti, laṅlaṅana riṅ āgama, pagǝrana pupūjān sasapon, lavaṅana saṅgarma, ugǝr ugǝrana sadā, inǝbana tuhu, tindihana kañciṅana parāmartha,
yeka ulahaniṅ saṅ tumaki-taki kābhyudayan, kābhyudayan ṅaranya, kavibhavan, kavibhavan ṅaranya, bandha savita, bandha savita ṅaranya, kasugihan kula rūpa, śakti vani, niroga nirvighna, cakṣyah lavajjanā, subrata dīrgha yuṣa yovaṇa avet aurip, maṅkana phalaniṅ brata yan inabhyāsa, ya kābhyudayan de saṅ surupa, maṅkana liṅ saṅ citta varaṇa, riṅ saṅ vala kula.
nambah hulun, mapa riṅ kanirāśrayan, mәne pukulun, mәne kami varah iri kita, lakoni siptaṅku riṅ lagi rumuhun, sājña pukulun, vurukәniṅ brata pukulun, pariñcinya, mvaṅ phalanya, a u ma.]

hana brata, tan pamaṅan tan paturu, bratanira saṅ hyaṅ vәkasniṅ kavi viśeṣa. pha, svarga lәvih, titisnya añakravr̥ttiañakravartti, subhaga anulus, anurāga riṅ rāt, katәkan sapinakṣanira riṅ bhūmi, dinuluriṅ hayu, śakti vani mahābhāra.
hana brata, ambhairava pakṣa, siṅ pinaṅan, tuhun tan trәṣṇeṅ turu, bhaṭāra pavakānugrahani, mvaṅ devata, pha, bhūta gandharva masih, janmanya puruṣa viśeṣa, subhaga anulus, ajrih kaṅ sarvagalak.

hana brata, tanntan paṅgilanipaṅilaniṅ sarvatinaḍahtaḍah sarvatinaḍah, vunive taḍah, sambaranabrata sambarā, ṅa, pha, vīryavansiddha vīryavan siddha sugihsugih saṅkansaṅan rare.
hana bratā, tan ... saṅkan rare
in III.293 in III.87

hana brata, ṅarәṅ, ṅa, amaṅan harәṅ rumuhun , bhaṭārī gaṅga hyaṅniṅ brata, ma, Om̐ gaṅgāya namaḥ, salek samayanya, pha, tan kerәṅan deniṅ jagat.
hana bratā, ṅar̥ṅ ... deniṅ jagat
in III.294 in III.75
hana brata, yan amaṅan maivak harәṅ tumpə̄r, pәtaṅ tahun samayanya, pha, keḍәp riṅ samanta janma, kinasihaniṅ rāt, keḍәpiṅ arabi anak anak.
hana brata, maṅan apisan, pituṅ lek pituṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, kinasihaniṅ rāt.

hana brata nitīkramaanītikrama, ṅa, amaṅan sadina sapisan, saṅ hyaṅhyaṅ smara hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, siṅ prih meṅgal katәmukatәkan, dīrgha yuṣa.
hana brata, maṅan pisan ... kinasihaniṅ rāt
in III.297 in III.117
nahan brata, maṅan piṅ saptami, pituṅ lek samayanya, kinasihaniṅ rāt phalanya.
hana brata, ambhūmi amasar bhuvana, ṅa, pha, sugih lәmah sīma.
hana brata, maṅan iṅ lәmah, pituṅ śaśih lavasnya, kinasihaniṅ rāt phalanya, bhūmi ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.

hana brata, mañcavāra, ṅa, u, marәp maṅetan amaṅan, pa, marәp kidul amaṅan. pva, marәp aṅulon. va, marәp aṅalor amaṅan. ka, siṅ harәpira maṅan, duluranya lalab kabeh, mvaṅ kǝmbaṅ anūt kadi varṇaniṅ sәga, pañcavarṇa, putih kuniṅ abaṅ irәṅ, riṅ teṅah pañcavarṇa, deva rata hyaṅnya, pha, mantuk iṅ svarga pada bhaṭāra śiva, pamit, sasarnya mañjanma rata añakravr̥tti, tan kapadhān. ma, Om̐ Om̐ śrī jagat guru padukebhyo namaḥ.

hana brata, mañcavāra dalәm, ṅa, kramanya, amaṅan uyah kevala, amaṅan sәkul kevala, salek tәluṅ dina samayanya, vus maṅkana, ulam kevala, vus maṅkana, toya kevala, vus maṅkana, aṅinaṅ kevala, vus maṅkana lavasnya, kәneṅ paṅan, tan kәneṅ turu, samaṅkana lavasnya, saṅ hyaṅ vәkasiṅ anuṅku rāt hyaṅnya ikaṅ brata, tan upir upir sukhanta, mantuk riṅ svargan bhaṭāra dharma, janmanya sukha maṅan aṅaṅgur, tan aṅhel panambut gave, sukha sugih tan pasaṅkan, kaṅ vvaṅ masih deva bikṣuka, mulihmuleh iri kita.

hana brata, luhuriṅ kayu, ṅa, tigaṅ lek samayanya, pha, vr̥ddhi putra, tur keḍәp siṅkeḍәpiṅ paṅucap.
hana bratā, luhuriṅ ... siṅ paṅūcap
in III.303 in III.98
hana brata, aturu luhuriṅ kayu, salek divasanya, pha, śakti kasiddhyan kapaṅguh.

hana brata, aṅalasaaṅelaśaaṅalesa, ṅa, asaṅidan iṅriṅ alas savәguṅavәguṅ, tan papasakapapasa deniṅ voṅ, ṅunivehunikaṅunakaṅ sarvasato, asǝpasәpnya, pha, prajurit riṅ paravu, aṅuṅgahana bahanya, vava, harәṅ prajurit riṅ ḍarat lugutanatluṅgutana vatu, saṅ buddha asuṅ bratasubrata, sasarnya dadi dam puhavaṅmpu vavaṅdәmpu havaṅ riṅ parahuprabhu, sugih savahtur sugih savah, tur sugih parahutur sugih jə̄ṅ.
hana brata, haṅelaśa ... sugih paravu
in III.305 in III.146 in III.96
hana brata, ṅraka sabran tilәm mvaṅ pūrṇama, sarvaputus, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ silih asih maveh brata, pha, tinuṅgviṅ rāma reṇa, sukha sugih prih avak, tur tan paṅubiṅ voṅ atuha.
hana brata, maṅan gǝḍaṅ tan kinulitan, tәluṅ vәṅi samayanya, saṅ hyaṅ murṣita hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, apәkik, yen strīistri mǝṅgǝpiṅ pahyunan, abәcikiṅ buddhi, vruhiṅ kaliṅanya, pituturiṅ bapebu.

hana brata, maṅan tuhuṅ pitpit rumuhun, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik muñcar, ṅaraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik aṅuñci pǝpǝt sira turun abrata, pinakabhaga, pinakarūpa, paṅadǝganiṅ vavadon, pinakalituhayupinakalistvayu, pha, drәman manis ta kita, lindihǝn voṅ apәkik, drәman anak anak, aputu riṅ niṣkala.

hana brata, ṅgiliralir kacaṅ, ṅa, kramanya, aṅuvāsa savәguṅ, amaṅan savәguṅ, hyaṅ prajābraja sadā hyaṅniṅ bratahyaṅnya, pha, mantuk riṅ svargan bhaṭāra Iśvara, sasarnya mañjanmapañjanma riṅ kulaputra sukha sugih, lәvih anulusalus, yan lanaṅlanaṅ puruṣa kula pratyakṣa anurāga kita, sugih pisis riṅ dlāha, yan istri samaṅkanaviśeṣa subhaga riṅ dlahā.
hana bratā, ṅgiliṛ ... istrī samaṅkana
in III.309 in III.115

hana brata, yan amaṅan sinaren kasumba, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik pari rāja, ṅa, hyaṅ maṇik teja bhūmi turun abrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakarah-dagiṅ, pinakahati, pha, riṅ dadi vvaṅ, sukha sugih, lituhayulistvayu, sәkar analum, akǝmbaṅ avoh riṅ niṣkala.

hana brata, maṅan sәkul sapuluṅ, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik tampa, ṅaraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ maṇḍala hyaṅniṅ brata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakakukusaniṅ śarīra, pha, asǝsǝkan kanaka aguṅ, kalavan alit, aśrī asambaṅ jarijya, siddhaniṅ vvaṅ sukha sugih, tan pәgat sādhana, mvaṅ mās maṇik, kinanti jagat kinanti japa kita riṅ dlāha.

hana brata, maṅan sәkul putih kuniṅ, aṅkǝn kalivon, umarәp pūrva, mevaka bhīra, paṅan pisan saṅaṅ kalivon divasanya, uttama saṅaṅ vulan, bhaṭāra śiva hyaṅniṅ brata, papalihan hyaṅ antadeva, ya pinakarūpa, pinakasamūha, pinakadīrgha yuṣa, yan lanaṅ pinakapәkikan, pinakapolah, pinakararas, yan vadon pinakakahayon pinakapolah, pinakaibon, pha, mulihiṅ svarga bhaṭāra śiva, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ prabhu añakravr̥ttiañakravarti, viku, bhujaṅga, śeva sogata, sugih malǝṅkә riṅ mās pirak, sarvasosoca, rare, hulun, kәbo sapi, mr̥gadi, vr̥ddhi putra, tinuṅgviṅ bapebu, kaki nini, ma, Om̐ hram̐ hrim̐ sah parāmaśivāditya ya namaḥ, ahyas.
